Name: Empire State Development
Description:
Empire State Development (ESD) is New York’s chief economic development agency.

The mission of Empire State Development is to promote a vigorous and growing state economy, encourage business investment and job creation, and support diverse, prosperous local economies across New York State through the efficient use of loans, grants, tax credits, real estate development, marketing and other forms of assistance.

ESD also oversees the marketing of “I LOVE NY,” the State’s iconic tourism brand (www.iloveny.com) & NYLovesFim New York State's Film, TV & Commercial Incentives (www.nylovesfilm.com)

Empire State Development is the parent organization of the New York State Department of Economic Development & the Empire State Development Corporation.  For more information on Empire State Development, visit www.esd.ny.gov.

Name: GreenCape
Description:
GreenCape is a non-profit organisation that drives the widespread adoption of economically viable green economy solutions in South Africa. 

We work with businesses, investors, academia and government to help unlock the investment and employment potential of green technologies and services, and to support a transition to a resilient green economy.  

We are a not-for-profit organisation established in 2010 to support the development of the green economy in the region.

Our vision
GreenCape’s vision is a thriving prosperous Africa mobilised by the green economy.

Our ambition
To be globally relevant in driving the uptake of green economy infrastructure solutions in the developing world context.

What do we do?
We work at the interface between business, government and academia in order to identify and remove barriers to economically viable green economy infrastructure solutions in developing countries, thereby catalysing their replicable and large-scale uptake to enable each country and its citizens to prosper.

Name: World Bank Group
Description:
The World Bank Group is one of the world’s largest sources of funding and knowledge for developing countries. Its five institutions share a commitment to reducing poverty, increasing shared prosperity, and promoting sustainable development.

  With 189 member countries, staff from more than 170 countries, and offices in over 130 locations, the World Bank Group is a unique global partnership: five institutions working for sustainable solutions that reduce poverty and build shared prosperity in developing countries.

Name: Nashville Entrepreneur Center
Description: Helping make Nashville the best place to start and grow a business by increasing the likelihood of success for entrepreneurs.

Name: PNG Labour Mobility Unit
Description:
PNG Labour Mobility Unit is Papua New Guinea's sole government body responsible and trusted for connecting quality, reliable PNG workers with employers in Australia, New Zealand, and other partner nations. We bring value to your team by delivering exceptional workers who embody dedication, adaptability, and integrity.

At PNGLMU, we are committed to preparing our workers to excel in international workplaces by equipping them with essential skills, cultural understanding, and financial literacy. Recognized for their hard work, strong ethics, and positive attitudes, PNG workers consistently exceed expectations, making them a preferred choice across industries. 

Our streamlined processes, commitment to efficiency, and quick turnaround times ensure top-quality service from recruitment to mobilization. When coming in-country to recruit, we ensure employers enjoy a hassle-free experience with seamless logistics, responsive support, and 100% personalized attention to their needs.

At the Labour Mobility Unit, we provide employment opportunities abroad to semi-skilled and low-skilled workers, offering them a second chance at achieving a better and more sustainable quality of life.

Name: Sustainable Development Technology Canada - Technologies du Développement Durable Canada
Description:
Our mission is to identify and fund Canadian companies that are developing, demonstrating and commercializing new technologies with the potential to transform Canada’s environmental and economic prosperity. With our support and funding during seed, start-up and scale-up stages, we are accelerating Canadian companies’ ability to become global leaders in their fields. 

Notre mission est de déterminer et de financer les entreprises canadiennes qui développent, démontrent et commercialisent de nouvelles technologies susceptibles de transformer la prospérité environnementale et économique du Canada. Avec notre soutien et notre financement pendant les phases d’amorçage, de démarrage et de croissance nous stimulons la capacité des entreprises canadiennes à devenir des chefs de file mondiaux dans leurs domaines.

Name: Ministère du Budget
Description: Budget, Économie, Finances, Fiscalité, Impôts, Douanes,

Name: ERSE
Description:
The Energy Services Regulatory Authority (ERSE) is a public corporate body provided with administrative and financial autonomy of its own as well as its own assets, its purpose being the regulation of the natural gas and electricity sectors.

ERSE is governed by its Statutes, approved by Decree-law nº 97/2002 and emended by Decree-law nº 212/2012 and Decree-law nº 84/2013, by the legal provisions that are specifically applicable to it, and complemented by the regime of public business entities.

ERSE is independent in the exercise of its functions, within the framework of the law, without prejudice to either the orientating principles of the energy policy fixed by the government, under constitutional and legal terms, or to the acts subject to ministerial supervision under the terms of the law and of its Statutes.

The aims of ERSE’s activities are: to protect the interests of consumers, in particular the vulnerable customers, with regard to prices, service quality, access to information; to ensure the existence of conditions of economic and financial balance by the activities of the regulated sectors exercised in the public interest, when managed properly and efficiently; promoting as regulator and accordance with applicable law, competition in the energy markets;  to encourage efficient energy use and protection of the environment; and also to arbitrate and resolve disputes, encouraging the settlement of disputes outside of the courts.

Name: City of Arlington
Description:
Arlington is The American Dream City because our competitive, can-do spirit makes dreams a reality for both businesses and residents. That spirit has been demonstrated many times over with big initiatives throughout its history. This page is designed to provide a window into the City of Arlington's Office of Economic Development, Human Resources Department, and other City business.

We are home to a host of global, domestic and family-owned businesses. And the American pride in our culturally-diverse citizens is undeniable. Home to the Texas Rangers, Dallas Cowboys, Arlington Renegades, Dallas Jackals, WNBA Dallas Wings, and North Texas Soccer Club. Arlington is the Entertainment Capital of the Southwest and an international destination, featuring the iconic Globe Life Field, the world-renown AT&T Stadium and the original Six Flags Over Texas theme park.

Name: Ministry of Finance and Economic Planning
Description:
At the Ministry of Finance and Economic Planning, we aim to:
Maintain a stable macroeconomic environment with low inflation, moderate budget deficits, and sustainable public debt;

Foster greater evidence-based planning and performance-based budgeting;
Mobilize internal and external resources; 

Achieve the highest international standards in Public Finance Management (PFM) in order to ensure an accountable use of resources

Improve the delivery of public services and accountability through effective financial and fiscal decentralization

Contribute to increase the productivity of the economy, employment opportunities, the investment climate, and the quality of public investments

Contribute to increase living standards of the population and human development within a sustainable environment

Promote a dynamic, efficient and stable financial market accessible to all segments of the population

Contribute to promote a fair and flexible labor market that rewards entrepreneurship and risk-taking behaviors for economic development

Ensure an efficient and equitable tax and benefit system with incentives to work, save and invest in the development of the country

Contribute to foster deep regional integration through openness to change as well as mobility of goods.

Build MINECOFIN into a strong, efficient and responsive institution

Name: Workforce Solutions
Description:
In everything that we do, we seek to assure the Gulf Coast region remains a great place to live, work and do business. To meet the demands of the rapidly-changing world in which we work, we have one foot firmly planted in today while keeping an eye steadily focused on what's to come. We believe our employer-driven and personalized approach to addressing the diverse needs of businesses and individuals affords each the best chance for sustainable success.

We are committed to strengthening the vibrancy of our region so that we can attract and retain the best employers, afford everyone the dignity of a job and remain indispensable to the global economy - today and tomorrow.

Auxiliary aids and services are available upon request to individuals with disabilities. Deaf, hard-of-hearing or speech-impaired customers may contact Relay Texas: 800-735-2989 (TTY) and 711 (Voice).

Equal opportunity is the law http://www.twc.state.tx.us/twcinfo/equal-opportunity.html

Workforce Solutions Gulf Coast.

Name: API
Description: API is one of Canada’s largest not-for-profit life sciences commercialization organizations. We catalyze growth in the life sciences sector by addressing key challenges that hold companies and innovators back.

Name: Fairfax County Economic Development Authority
Description:
Promoting the competitive advantages of Fairfax County, Virginia, USA (minutes from Washington, D.C.) and influence the growth of a diverse and innovative ecosystem that enhances the tax base, creates demand for commercial space, and supports an extraordinary and equitable quality of life across Fairfax County.

The FCEDA offers site location and business development assistance, and connections with county and state government agencies, to help companies locate and expand in Fairfax County.

In addition to its headquarters in Tysons, Fairfax County's largest central business district, the FCEDA has a presence in key global markets worldwide: Bangalore, Berlin, London, Los Angeles and Seoul.

Name: Port San Antonio
Description: Port San Antonio develops and manages Tech Port campus, a 1,900-acre innovation destination where aerospace, defense, cybersecurity, and other advanced industries grow and collaborate as they develop new technologies. The campus is home to more than 80 employers and 19,000 workers and generates $20 billion in annual economic impact statewide. As one of America’s fastest-growing technology hubs, Tech Port is expanding, career, educational and business opportunities regionally, nationally and globally.

Name: Nch’ḵay̓ Development Corporation
Description: Nch’ḵay̓ was established in 2018 as the economic development arm of the Squamish Nation. Its mandate is to develop, manage and own the active businesses of the Nation, and was created to allow for the separation of business and politics within the Squamish Nation. The name Nch’ḵay̓ was chosen as a reference to the Great Flood – the flood that forced Squamish Nation ancestors to tie their canoes to the highest mountain in the territory, Mount Garibaldi, in order to survive.

Name: Expertise France in Libya
Description: Expertise France implements several projects in Libya focusing on economic development, digitalisation and governance. The ongoing projects are: E-nable, Raqameyon, PAMRI and Mendami.

Name: Opportunity Austin
Description: Opportunity Austin is the regional economic partnership fostering innovation, investment, workforce development, and livability across the Austin region. Harnessing the region’s unrivaled economic momentum, our mission is to be a force multiplier for businesses that share our drive for enduring prosperity. Ultimately, we improve the strength power, and performance of our region and those who do business within it.

Name: Algérie 2030
Description: Relevons ensemble, les défis économiques futurs

Name: Europe-Asia Economic Summit
Description: EAES aims to provide a platform for both international large-scale companies and SMEs to engage with industry leaders, connect with potential partners, create business opportunities, and foster meaningful cooperation between Europe and Asia.

Name: National Institute for Governance and Sustainable Development (NIGSD)
Description:
National Institute for Governance and Sustainable Development” (NIGSD)  is a public economic organization, with advisory, training and research identity, supervised by the Minister for Planning and Economic Development.  The Institute has changed its vision and trends to serve Egypt’s Vision 2030 and to promote the concepts of governance and good governance, based on the decision of the Council of Ministers on 12 August 2020, instead of being the National Management Institute. 

المعهد القومي للحوكمة و التنمية المستدامة هو منظمة اقتصادية عامة، لها هوية استشارية وتدريبية وبحثية، ويشرف عليها وزارة التخطيط و التنمية الاقتصادية. لقد تغيرت رؤية المعهد واتجاهاته لخدمة رؤية مصر ٢٠٣٠ ولتعزيز مفاهيم الحوكمة والحكم الرشيد، بناًد علي قرار مجلس الوزراء في ١٢ أغسطس ٢٠٢٠، بدلًا من أن يكون المعهد القومي للإدارة.

Name: NEXT MANNHEIM
Description: NEXT MANNHEIM ist die Dachmarke, unter der die Stadt Mannheim ihr Startup-Ökosystem, Gründungsinitiativen und Innovationsförderung bündelt und aktiv gestaltet. Inzwischen umfasst das System acht dedizierte Startup-Zentren, in denen mehr als 300 Startups beheimatet sind. Damit steigt Mannheim national wie international in der Wahrnehmung als urbaner Gründer- und Innovationshub — ein Erfolg, der wesentlich auf die Rahmenbedingungen zurückzuführen ist, die NEXT Mannheim initiiert: Förderprogramme, Finanzierungsmöglichkeiten, Beratung, Inkubatoren, Accelerator-Angebote, interdisziplinäre Formate, Coworking Spaces und schneller Zugang zu passenden Netzwerken. NEXT Mannheim stellt seinen Startups über 30.000 Quadratmeter geförderten Arbeitsraum zur Verfügung, subventioniert durch das Land Baden-Württemberg, die Stadt Mannheim und EU-Mittel. Mit mehr als 1.200 Mitarbeitenden profitieren die Startups nicht nur von Arbeitsraum, sondern auch von Know-how, Netzwerken und unterstützenden Services, die ihnen helfen, national und international sichtbar zu werden. Pro Jahr berät NEXT Mannheim in seinen Zentren über 600 Gründer*innen und Startup-Interessierte — eine beachtliche Zahl, von denen viele direkt in den Zentren ihre Unternehmen gründen. Die NEXT-Startup-Community bietet Gründern ein agiles Netzwerk, das lokale und internationale Unternehmen verbindet. Das bundesweit einzigartige Ecosystem wird durch Workshops, Meetups, Acceleratoren, Hackathons und internationale Konferenzen ergänzt — Events, die Wissen, Sichtbarkeit und Kooperation ermöglichen.

Name: Arlington Economic Development
Description:
Arlington Economic Development is Arlington County’s economic development organization, driving innovation, investment and business growth in one of the nation’s most dynamic and innovative communities.

We work with startups to global corporations, helping them launch, grow and compete — connecting them to top talent, leading research institutions and the broader innovation ecosystem.

Arlington offers one of the most educated workforces in the U.S., with deep expertise across cybersecurity, aerospace and defense, advanced technologies and professional services. Home to the Pentagon, DARPA and university-led innovation campuses, Arlington is where ideas move quickly from research to real-world impact.

With exceptional transportation connectivity and highly livable neighborhoods, Arlington gives companies the speed, access and talent they need to lead what’s next.

Name: BIND - Basque Open Innovation Platform
Description:
BIND is an award-winning Open Innovation Platform that connects early-stage startups with leading Intelligent Industry, Smart Energy and Sustainability, Health Tech and Food Tech companies offering paid contracts. BIND is a public-private acceleration program designed and developed by the Basque Government and SPRI. It lasts 24 weeks and takes place in Basque Country, Spain. 

The BIND platform aims to support the startups selected by accelerating their development and growth through an intense working program that includes:

- Up to €150,000 contract with an Industry leading Corporate Client
- Support Services: World-class mentoring, excellent training and alumni program, demo day, access to financing, participation in industry events, accommodation assistance, free workspace and technological support.
- Networking: Close contact within the established Advanced Industrial and Entrepreneurial ecosystem, one of the strongest in Europe.
- No equity taken and no fees to participate

Name: Carlsen Center for Innovation & Entrepreneurship
Description:
Our mission is to make innovation and entrepreneurship simple, accessible, and pervasive throughout the Greater Sacramento Region. Our vision is to become the premier center for regional innovation and entrepreneurship in the country.

We aim to do this by offering all Sacramento State students, faculty and staff, no matter their major or discipline, the ability to learn, explore and build on their business or non-profit ideas.  The Center welcomes alumni and community members as well.

Offering practical experience in experimentation and innovation, coupled with networking and collaborative opportunities, the Center nurtures the entrepreneurial spirit of those who want to explore pathways to solve problems and take solutions to market.  The Center helps drive the regional economy as it supports those who dream big in areas such as technology, governmental, and/or social entrepreneurship.

Our structure and approach is unique as we are interdisciplinary and interrelated allowing us to create cross-collaboration, team-building, and solution-building across disciplines. 

https://www.csus.edu/center/carlsen/

Name: Catalyste+
Description:
With over 50 years’ experience in over 30 countries, our global reputation is based on our demonstrated ability to manage consistently high-performing, highly inclusive impact-driven projects globally and at home. Our people are how we do this. Catalyste+ Expert Advisors are drawn from an elite cadre of volunteer business leaders and Canadian public service governance experts culturally trained to journey thousands of miles to share their knowledge and collaborate with our clients to develop highly localized solutions to strengthen economies, for better lives. We call it the Catalyste+ effect.

Avec plus de 50 ans d'expérience dans plus de 30 pays, notre réputation mondiale repose sur notre capacité démontrée à gérer de manière constante des projets à fort impact, très inclusifs, tant à l'échelle mondiale que nationale. Ce sont nos collaborateurs qui font cela possible. Les Conseillers Experts de Catalyste+ proviennent d'un groupe d'élite de chefs d'entreprise bénévoles et d'experts en gouvernance du service public canadien, formés culturellement pour parcourir des milliers de kilomètres afin de partager leurs connaissances et collaborer avec nos clients pour élaborer des solutions hautement localisées visant à renforcer les économies, pour des vies meilleures. Nous appelons cela l'effet Catalyste+.

Name: MCA LESOTHO II
Description: The Millennium Challenge Account- Lesotho II (MCA-Lesotho II) is an independent entity responsible for implementing the Lesotho Health and Horticulture Compact funded by Millennium Challenge Corporation-MCC.

Name: BOLD Community
Description:
Connecting pioneers, changemakers & visionaries across the globe to co-create BOLD ideas and real impact!

 Who we are
We are the global innovation community — born in Austria, connecting the world.
The BOLD Community unites pioneers, visionaries, and changemakers from across industries to spark new connections, share BOLD ideas, and drive global innovation.

 What we do
We connect thought leaders, creators, and innovators from business, politics, research, and the creative industries.
Through our international network of more than 2,700 members, we foster cross-industry collaboration and bring global best practices and innovative solutions to Austria — empowering sustainable growth and transformation.

 Our mission
Our shared vision is clear: to shape the economy of tomorrow.
By connecting brilliant minds from around the world, we strengthen innovation and international cooperation — with a powerful boost from Austria.

 Why you should join us
Because change needs connection.
As part of the BOLD Community, you’ll join a global network of innovators working to create real impact.
Meet inspiring pioneers, collaborate across borders, and become part of a movement that turns BOLD ideas into action.

 Join, matchmake, collaborate!

Name: Global Black Economic Forum
Description: The Global Black Economic Forum is dedicated to elevating and advocating for Black and marginalized communities around the world through thought leadership, global summits, workplace training, and policy advocacy. It's time to usher in a more dynamic and equitable future for all.

Name: Montgomery County Economic Development Corporation - Maryland
Description: Montgomery County Economic Development Corporation operates as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit public-private partnership and is funded by Montgomery County. We are dedicated to attracting, retaining and expanding businesses within key industries to Montgomery County, Md.

Name: nextMedia.Hamburg
Description:
Wir sind die erste Anlaufstelle und Innovationsförderung für die Hamburger Medien- und Digitalwirtschaft. Wir fokussieren uns auf zukunftsfähige Geschäftsmodelle an der Schnittstelle von Content zu Technologie. 

Wir sind Teil der Hamburg Kreativ Gesellschaft mbH und werden von der Stadt Hamburg getragen.

Name: African Economics Association
Description: The African Economic Association (AEA) was established to promote the study and discussion of economic issues relevant to the African continent. Its primary purposes include fostering economic research and scholarship in Africa, providing a platform for the exchange of ideas among economists and policymakers, and advocating for policies that contribute to sustainable economic development across the continent. The association also aims to support the professional development of African economists and to facilitate networking opportunities within the field.

Name: Hessen Trade & Invest GmbH
Description:
Hessen Trade & Invest – Wirtschaftsförderer für Hessen

Die Hessen Trade & Invest GmbH (HTAI) ist die Wirtschaftsentwicklungsgesellschaft des Landes Hessen. Unsere Aufgabe ist es, den Wirtschafts- und Technologiestandort Hessen nachhaltig weiterzuentwickeln, um seine Wettbewerbsfähigkeit zu festigen und auszubauen. Durch gezielte Aktivitäten tragen wir dazu bei, den Wohlstand und Lebensstandard aller Bürgerinnen und Bürger in Hessen langfristig zu erhalten und zu erhöhen. Dabei arbeiten wir partnerschaftlich mit Wirtschaft, Wissenschaft, Verwaltung und Politik zusammen. Geschäftsführer der HTAI ist Dr. Rainer Waldschmidt.

Impressum: https://www.htai.de/impressum/

Name: Programme Economie Bleue
Description:
Le programme Economie Bleue, Pêche et Aquaculture, financé par l'Union européenne, a pour objectif de contribuer au développement durable de l'économie bleue en Algérie en cohérence avec la Stratégie Nationale pour l'Economie Bleue (SNEB 2030).
Ce programme est mis en œuvre par Expertise France, agence publique de conception et de mise en œuvre de projets internationaux de coopération technique et l'AECP, agence européenne de contrôle des pêches.

Name: Observatoire Économique du Niger
Description:
Votre source d'analyses et d'insights sur les dynamiques économiques du Niger. Découvrez des données, des tendances et des perspectives pour mieux comprendre l’économie nigérienne et ses enjeux.

E-mail : economistes.monde.niger@gmail.com

Name: FloridaCommerce
Description: Official page of the Florida Department of Commerce

Name: National Youth Caucus Kenya
Description: The National Youth Caucus Kenya is a youth-led and youth-centric organization whose core objective is youth economic empowerment through practical and sustainable solutions.

Name: Kamar Dagang dan Industri (Kadin) Indonesia / Indonesian Chamber of Commerce and Industry
Description:
Kadin Indonesia was established on September 24, 1968, and designated by Law Number 1 of 1987 as the hub organization for business in the fields of state-owned enterprises, cooperatives, and private enterprises worldwide. 

The business network of Kadin Indonesia covers all provinces and municipalities in Indonesia and encompasses business associations in all sectors of the economy. 

With a broad business network throughout the region, Kadin Indonesia act as an attractive and strategic partner for business, trade, and investment activities.

Name: JAD Jardin des métiers d'art et du design
Description: Lieu de production dédié à la création contemporaine, l’innovation et la transmission.

Name: Eswatini Water and Agricultural Development Enterprise (EWADE)
Description: The Eswatini Water and Agricultural Development Enterprise (EWADE) is the leading and key water and agricultural development investment implementation agent of the Government with programmes that focus on mobilizing people, development of Swazi Nation land and constructive use of water resources to stimulate food security, poverty alleviation and social invigoration in disadvantaged parts of the country.

Name: PartnerTulsa
Description:
PartnerTulsa is focused on Tulsa’s future as a world-class city with thriving communities and businesses. As the city continues to grow, we want all Tulsans to benefit from increased economic prosperity. To do this, we are committed to eliminating systemic barriers that limit or prevent access to quality jobs, housing, and wealth attainment.

We facilitate and create strategic partnerships to support neighborhoods, residents, entrepreneurs, and businesses with the goal of ensuring all Tulsans, regardless of zip code, can live affordably, support families, and grow businesses.

Name: Xiimba Ecosystems Private Limited
Description:
Our aspirations drive us to the immediate focus on rural landscapes in India wherein at least 750 Million to 800 Million people reside. 

Xiimba Ecosystems has embarked upon an initiative to uplift the living and enhance life quality through comprehensively impacting and creating new ecosystems. 

We believe the prosperity ecosystem is the root and foundation of the making of the knowledgeable, healthy, prosperous, purposeful, growth oriented contributory to the world, righteous, happy, joyful and thriving communities. Such communities then shall consolidate into meaningful and  global societies.
 
We have structured and converged our national arena into thousands of individual clusters of 4 to 6 villages. Each cluster shall have a population of 14,000 to 18,000 people. India is more of a continent rather than a country and therefore there is huge demographic and other variations at every short distance. 

Therefore while such clusters shall be unique in themselves but can be woven and integrated in overall national fabric and bandwidth.

Name: Fabriqué en Occitanie
Alexandria Economic Development Partnership
Description:
The Alexandria Economic Development Partnership is a 501(c)6 public-private partnership that serves to promote the City of Alexandria as a premier location for businesses, entrepreneurs, nonprofits, and cutting-edge institutions of science and learning. We do this through proactive business attraction and retention, marketing and promotion, and by facilitating real estate development deals that create the environment necessary to support commerce. Our success results in increased employment opportunities, a stronger economy to benefit all Alexandrians, and new tax revenues to enhance the quality of life in Alexandria

Join the conversation!

Facebook.com/AlexandriaEcon/
Instagram.com/AlexandriaEcon
LinkedIn Group: http://linkd.in/1iVqQ9d

Name: HA Hessen Agentur GmbH
Description: Die HA Hessen Agentur GmbH mit Sitz in Wiesbaden ist die Wirtschaftsförderungsgesellschaft des Landes Hessen. Ihre zentrale Aufgabe ist die nationale und internationale Vermarktung einer der wirtschaftsstärksten Regionen Europas. Sie vereint Wirtschaftsforschung und Landesentwicklung, Standort- und Tourismusmarketing sowie wichtige Kernaufgaben der Technologie- und Innovationsförderung unter einem Dach und ist damit erster Ansprechpartner für in- und ausländische Unternehmen, Investoren, Kommunen, regionale Wirtschaftsförderer, Universitäten und Forschungseinrichtungen genauso wie für Existenzgründer, Touristen, Kammern und Verbände. Die im Jahr 2005 gegründete Hessen Agentur mit heute 135 Mitarbeitern wird von Dr. Rainer Waldschmidt geleitet.

Name: Global Prize for Innovation in Water (GPIW)
Description: A global prize celebrating breakthrough innovations in water. Advancing sustainability through science, tech, and impact.

Name: Utah Inland Port Authority
Description:
We move Utah forward. We maximize long-term economic benefits in Utah by developing and optimizing economic project areas and logistics-based infrastructure.

We aspire to transform Utah through multi-generational, logistics-based, economic solutions.

Name: Mpumalanga Green Cluster Agency
Description:
Vision: Mpumalanga is a world-leading region in creating decent, green jobs by creating the enabling environment for new investments in low carbon growth. The Mpumalanga Green Cluster Agency works at the interface between business, government, and academia in order to identify and remove barriers to an economically viable green economy catalysing their uptake to enable the region and its citizens to prosper.

We work both at the micro and macro level supporting green-tech SMEs build their businesses, enabling bigger businesses to improve their environmental footprint, and assisting the provincial government to create the right environment for a more resilient green economy. Ultimately, we are helping to facilitate more investment and stimulate job creation into Mpumalanga’s green economy.

Name: New Growth Innovation Network
Description:
New Growth Innovation Network (NGIN) is a national nonprofit that equips economic, community, and government leaders with insights, innovations, capital, and localized support to ensure that economically excluded communities can lead, shape, and benefit from regional economic growth. 

By shifting the field of inclusive growth from theory to practice, we work to build shared wealth across all of America’s communities and regions.

Name: Creative Startups
Description: At the forefront of the creative economy since 2008, Creative Startups empowers economic developers and local partners worldwide with strategic plans that promote economic and environmental resilience.

Name: UPICA
Description:
Welcome to UPICA – Uttar Pradesh Investment and Commercial Agency

UPICA is led by Gangels Venture Catalyst Private Limited (Registered under Startup India) and is a forward-looking private body dedicated to accelerating economic growth, industrial development, and investment opportunities in the state of Uttar Pradesh. As a strategic platform, UPICA serves as a catalyst for interactions that unlock value, foster innovation, and drive inclusive development.

Our core mission is to position Uttar Pradesh as a premier destination for domestic and global investments by enabling ease of doing business, offering expert consultation to organizations, and nurturing partnerships across sectors. UPICA works proactively to bridge the information gap and ensuring aligned interests and transparent collaboration.

Through sector-specific advisory, market intelligence, and strategic liaisoning, UPICA supports startups, MSMEs, and large enterprises in navigating regulatory frameworks, identifying opportunities, and expanding operations within Uttar Pradesh.

Additionally, UPICA plays a dynamic role in media and communication promoting the state’s economic potential, government policies, growth narratives, and success stories. By showcasing UP’s strengths in infrastructure, talent, innovation, and resources, UPICA helps shape a robust, investment-friendly ecosystem.

Join us in reimagining Uttar Pradesh’s economic future. 

Collaborate. Consult. Grow.

Name: José Carlos Díez Gangas
Description:
José Carlos Díez es uno de los economistas más influyentes y mediáticos del momento. Tiene detrás una larga trayectoria profesional y de ella podemos destacar los siguientes hitos:

- Durante 9 años, fue economista jefe de 𝘐𝘯𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘮𝘰𝘯𝘦𝘺, bróker líder en España en deuda pública, desde donde asesoró a las principales empresas y entidades financieras españolas. 

- Participó en la creación de las previsiones del panel de expertos del BCE para la economía de la Eurozona y de FUNCAS para España.

- Su vida académica se ha desarrollado principalmente en la Universidad de Alcalá de Henares donde es Profesor de Macroeconomía y Finanzas Internacionales desde 2002. También fue profesor de Macroeconomía en el Master of Business Administration de ICADE.

- Su presencia en los principales medios de comunicación nacionales e internacionales es muy intensa: columnista habitual de El País (entre otros medios), donde publica una colaboración semanal, colaborador de medios internacionales como Bloomberg, Reuters, The Economist y Financial Times.

- Premio Bitácoras 2016 al mejor Blog de Economía.

- Su prestigio le ha llevado a ser Miembro del Consejo Asesor del PNUD, organismo de la ONU para América Latina.

- Es CEO de Global Economic Analysis, una consultora que asesora sobre estrategias financieras y económicas, y Director de la cátedra Orfin de la Universidad Alcalá
En 2012 publicó su primer Best Seller, “Hay vida después de la crisis” y en 2015 “La economía no da la felicidad”.

Name: Camara de Comercio del Oeste de PR Inc
Description: Impulsamos el desarrollo económico del Oeste de Puerto Rico, conectando empresarios, profesionales y estudiantes con oportunidades de crecimiento, innovación y liderazgo.

Name: Wirtschaftsjunioren Fichtelgebirge
Description:
Wir sind ein Netzwerk von jungen Unternehmern, Unternehmerinnen und Führungskräften aus der Region Fichtelgebirge. 

Was macht uns aus?

Name: Cecil County Office of Economic Development
Description:
At the Cecil County Office of Economic Development, we connect people with opportunity. Whether you're launching a business, expanding operations, exploring investment, or putting down roots in our community, our team is here to help you grow.

Located between Philadelphia and Baltimore along the I-95 corridor, Cecil County combines unbeatable access with business-friendly leadership, a collaborative workforce development ecosystem, and room to grow—thanks to affordable land, industrial assets, and shovel-ready sites. Our rural charm, historic towns, and waterfront landscapes pair beautifully with a spirit of innovation and momentum. We work hand-in-hand with businesses, developers, site selectors, entrepreneurs, and community partners to bring big ideas to life—backed by local insight, strong state and regional alliances, and a results-driven approach.

From Main Street to manufacturing, we believe in investing in people, places, and possibilities.

Name: Share Alliance
Description:
Our vision is to enable people from all walks of life and throughout the world to make the journey from working for money towards the point where money works for them. In economic terms, this means that we would no longer see capital and labour as protagonists across society; but where both are available to all. It is central to this vision that these opportunities should be for individuals, and that they should be steered by principles of disintermediation and ownership/responsibility. 

A central objective is to demonstrate how inter-generational rebalancing can break the cycles of deprivation which deny so many young people the opportunity to achieve their potential in adult life. The provision of starter capital accounts combined with programmes of incentivised learning, funded by hypothecation of existing inheritance levies, are designed to provide a continuing constitutional basis for the individual empowerment of young people from disadvantaged and low-income backgrounds.

We also see the technological revolution as offering a real opportunity to move swiftly into widespread capital participation, introducing a new form of distributed governance  and sharing of wealth creation whereby data storage and harvesting by tech giants is recognised by equity stock ownership for their customers.

These and other propositions are currently being researched at Cambridge University: this strong academic foundation will enable us to move to a programme of education and training, advocacy, and in due course implementation at both national and international levels.

Share Alliance, which was registered as a Charity in January 2024, intends to host a series of conferences to build awareness, interest and dialogue, the first of which took place at King's College, Cambridge on Friday 14th April 2023.

Name: Heves Vármegyei Kereskedelmi és Iparkamara/ Heves County Chamber of Commerce and Industry
Description:
A Kamara feladatának tekinti, hogy a piaci versenyben a vállalkozói környezet javításával, gazdasági elemzésekkel, előrejelzésekkel, a szakképzés feladatainak koordinálásával, javaslatokkal, megbízható üzleti kapcsolatok kiépítésével, üzleti tanácsadással segítse tagjait és a gazdasági élet szereplőit. A Kamara tevékenysége elsődlegesen a vállalkozásokat érinti, amelyek azonban elválaszthatatlanok az ott dolgozó munkavállalóktól, foglalkoztatási kérdésektől és a munkaerő piac aktuális kihívásaitól. 
A HKIK működésének alapjait a gazdasági kamarákról szóló 1999. évi CXXI. törvény, illetve a Kamara Alapszabálya határozza meg. A kamara hivatása, hogy - a kamarai törvénynek, más jogszabályoknak és az alapszabálynak megfelelően - önkormányzaton alapuló működésével előmozdítsa a gazdaság fejlődését és szerveződését, az üzleti forgalom biztonságát és a piaci magatartás tisztességét, a gazdasági tevékenységet folytatók általános, együttes érdekeinek érvényesülését, valamint ellássa a gazdaság működésével összefüggő azon feladatokat, amelyeket törvény, s ennek alapján az alapszabály a feladatkörébe utal. 
A HKIK székhelye Egerben található, kirendeltségein Gyöngyösön és Hatvanban is a vállalkozásokat segítik munkatársai.  
A HKIK Projekt Irodája folyamatos és aktív tanácsadási, kutatási és gazdaságfejlesztési tevékenységet végez a megyében működő vállalkozások számára, az elérhető pályázati és kedvezményes hitellehetőségek kapcsán. Emellett mindhárom városban működtet vállalkozói klubokat, szakmai mesterklubokat és Női üzleti reggelit is.

A Kamara feladatának tekinti, hogy a piaci versenyben segítse tagjait:
•	a vállalkozói környezet javításával, 
•	gazdasági elemzésekkel, előrejelzésekkel, 
•	a szakképzés feladatok koordinálásával, 
•	javaslatokkal, 
•	megbízható üzleti kapcsolatok kiépítésével, 
•	üzleti tanácsadással.

Name: Economic Thought and Practice
Description: Economic Thought and Practice is scientific journal published by the University of Dubrovnik. It encourages high quality submissions on a broad range of topics in the field of economic including theoretical, applied, interdisciplinary and methodological work. The submissions are welcomed, but not only, on the issues of producer and consumer behaviour, regional and industrial economics, tourism, financial markets, unemployment, inflation, globalisation and international economic integration, institutional economics, economic policy, development and growth, history of economic thought and other fields of economy. All papers are subject to a «double-blind» review process, detailed in the Guide for Authors. Besides research articles the journal also publishes a variety of other types of papers such as book reviews, occasional discussion papers on important topical issues and conference summaries. The journal supports open access to the published papers. It is co-financed by the Ministry of Science and Education of the Republic of Croatia. The journal is published twice a year (June and December).

Name: Work to Own

The focus of the EO Index is to:
• Equip companies to correlate data with company performance metrics
• Inform the market to set a new standard for broad-based ownership
• Provide workers with an opportunity to generate wealth

The EO Index creates a market solution where government policies have fallen short, enabling company leaders to create shareholder value while positioning their companies as change agents in the creation of generational wealth for their employees.

Unsere Aktivitäten reichen von Gewerbeausstellungen wie der IGeA, über die Aescher USESTUELETE bis hin zu regelmäßigen Stammtischen und Vereinsanlässen. Damit bieten wir nicht nur unseren Mitgliedern eine Plattform für gegenseitigen Austausch und Kooperation, sondern auch den direkten Kontakt zu den Kundinnen und Kunden vor Ort. 

Ob Baugewerbe, Detaillisten, Dienstleistungsbetriebe, Industrie oder Gastronomie – wir verbinden die vielfältigen Branchen in einer starken Gemeinschaft. Durch kleine Kurskorrekturen und innovative Ideen passen wir uns gemeinsam den Marktgegebenheiten an, um stets optimal aufgestellt zu sein.

Gewerbe Aesch: Eine starke Gemeinschaft für Ihre Zukunft!

Name: Iran Maritime Economic Forum
Description:
The 4th Iran Maritime Economic Forum (IMEF)/ “North-South Corridor” will take place on 12-13 Feb 2024 at IRIB International Conference Center in Tehran.

This corridor is the most important route that could reduce transit time between Asia and Europe. At this forum, the importance, opportunities, challenges and development of this corridor will be highlighted. The presence of officials, managers, experts, businessmen and international traders will get the most benefit of using this corridor.

IMEF is organized by Shipping Association of Iran and Kish IICIC in cooperation with Ports and Maritime Organization of Iran (PMO), Trade Promotion Organization of Iran (TPO) and Iran Chamber of Commerce, Industries, Mines and Agriculture (ICCIMA).

The 2-day forum will be organized online and in person. Participants who are not able to attend the event physically, can use forum's virtual event platform. On the sideline of the Forum, a number of workshops will be held on topics related to the maritime industry that could not be fully explored in the main Forum as well as business promotion opportunity for companies and institutions interested to introduce their technology achievements, engineering products and services related to the transportation, transit and logistics industry. At the same time, an exhibition will be held at the venue of the Forum, where exhibitors have the opportunity to present their products, services and capabilities.

Description:
Csatlakozz a 63 milliárd fa ültetését célzó kezdeményezéshez, hogy a Föld újra szabadon lélegezhessen – és közben te is csökkentsd az ökológiai lábnyomodat!
A Green Connect Program egyedülálló kezdeményezés, amely összeköti a Természetet, a gazdaságot és a társadalmat, ahol a profit és a felelősség együtt teremtenek értéket. 
Programunk lehetőséget ad vállalatoknak, vásárlóknak és magánszemélyeknek, hogy aktívan részt vállaljanak a természet regenerálásában és a közösségek erősítésében. Digitális és transzparens rendszerünk biztosítja, hogy minden támogatás nyomon követhető és mérhető legyen. Hiszünk abban, hogy a technológia és az emberi együttműködés összehangolásával egy kölcsönösségen alapuló, zöldebb jövő építhető. Légy részese annak a változásnak, ahol a Természet és a profit kéz a kézben jár.

Name: Observatorio de Coyuntura Económica y Políticas Públicas (OCEPP)
Description:
El Observatorio de Coyuntura Económica y Políticas Públicas (OCEPP) es un espacio de economistas  y profesionales de otras disciplinas abocados a pensar la realidad económica y social argentina. En particular nos especializamos en temas de finanzas, provincias, economía popular y género.
 
Desde el OCEPP realizamos debates de coyuntura, formaciones en economía, informes de coyuntura económica, informes temáticos, indicadores propios,  e intervenimos en los medios de comunicación. En todas nuestras tareas la comunicación con el público es central porque estamos convencidos de que las ideas son fructíferas cuando son transmitidas en forma amplia, clara y directa.

Desde el 2021 formamos parte de la Fundación Igualdad, un espacio que nuclea centros de estudio de distintas áreas temáticas en la búsqueda de una sociedad más igualitaria y plena de derechos, apuntando a articular la producción de conocimiento tanto con el sector público como también con distintas organizaciones de la sociedad civil.
 
Invitamos a participar a todos aquellos que compartan estas inquietudes y quieran sumarse a pensar cómo transformar la realidad argentina!

Name: Klamath IDEA
Description:
Klamath IDEA is a community initiative committed to developing a thriving entrepreneurial ecosystem in Klamath County to strengthen existing small businesses and innovators and support the emergence of new ones.

How do we accomplish this?

Klamath IDEA facilitates the linking of the varying elements of the entrepreneurial ecosystem: economic development organizations, government agencies, business resource providers, and financial and human capital. Klamath IDEA then connects growth-minded entrepreneurs to the elements and one another by:

Hosting IDEA Talks and other entrepreneur focused events
Supporting local entrepreneurial, pitch, and demo competitions
Co-hosting the Rural Business and Innovation Summit
Curating access to trusted entrepreneurial resources at klamathidea.org
Housing the Center for Entrepreneurship (a business training classroom)
Employing an Entrepreneur Concierge to identify opportunities and make connections
The Process

Contact us by phone at 541-887-8298, or email us at info@klamathidea.org

You will talk to one of our staff, who will gather information about your business and your needs.
We then guide you to the business resources that can best help you.
After a few weeks, our staff will follow up with you to assure your satisfaction.
This referral service is provided at no cost to South Central Oregon entrepreneurs and small business owners.

Online Search Option

The Resource Navigator allows you to conduct your own customized search 24/7.

Name: Economics Scientific Association of Tarbiat Modares University
Description: Economics has contributed to the enhancement of man's knowledge and his attainment of higher life standards. Presently, people enjoy a much better living conditions compared with any era in the past. Economists as a subdivision of social sciences try to explain and project human behaviors within certain patterns and models. They do this as accurately and vigorously as the scientists of physics and natural sciences explain and describe physical or natural phenomena. The 'theories of maximizing behaviors which have been developed by economists along with 'maximizing theories of physical and natural behaviors' have created valuable results, that is why the 18th and 20th centuries are called the 'economists' centuries'. However, the contemporary world faces globalization, environmental damage, existing unfair income gaps between national and world wealth, and is less interested in ideological challenges. That is when economists can play a better role by offering theories to create a fairer, healthier and more active world. Economists can cooperate with the specialists of other humanity sciences to accomplish this mission. This expectation is based on a simple assumption that the solution for complex social problems sometimes lies in the recruitment of specialists of different fields. No doubt, Islamic economics can also play a much more significant role in this domain.

Description:
Philosophy Statement:
At the core of Crissy Dastrup's artistic journey lies a deep appreciation for collaboration and creativity, rooted in her public art community driven creative expression. Crissy envisions a world where art becomes a powerful tool for connection and change, driven by community participation and the infusion of fresh, innovative ideas.

Body of Work:
With a career spanning over fifteen years, Crissy Dastrup has earned national acclaim as a Creative Placemaker. Her journey began with grassroots initiatives such as Troostapalooza, a celebration of community and culture. Founding Troost Market Collective showcased her commitment to empowering local artisans and fostering economic growth, echoing the pragmatic and entrepreneurial spirit of her Arkansas upbringing.  Crissy 

Crissy's impactful projects, including KC Art on the Block | A Black Lives Matter Project, illustrate her ability to amplify marginalized voices and provoke meaningful dialogue through art. Her recent endeavor is CREATIVE REVIVAL, an immersive concert showcasing sights and sounds within a cirque-like festival experience.  Crissy currently serves as a curator and advisor with focused effort toward the growth of Art Garden KC.

Published and Award-Winning:
Crissy Dastrup's contributions to creative placemaking have been nationally recognized with numerous awards and publications. Her innovative approach and transformative impact have earned her accolades in the field, underscoring her commitment to using art as a catalyst for social change and community empowerment.

Name: NGI LocalForLocal
Description:
NGI LocalforLocal brings the vision of the Next Generation Internet into practice by supporting local currency initiatives across Europe with a shared, sovereign technological foundation. The project is carried out with support from Centric as part of the NGI initiative, funded by the European Union.

Our open source ecosystem enables local projects to collaborate, co-develop, and share software components, strengthening independence from foreign tech providers while fostering a resilient and cooperative network.

Our goals:
-Build a European network of local currencies that provides mutual support  and strengthens their position across Europe.
-Generate socio economic impact in local regions through more effective and widely adopted local currencies.
-Develop a high performing open source software stack tailored to the needs of European local currency initiatives.

By creating a currency federation, NGI LocalforLocal connects local initiatives, enhances their resilience, and promotes collaboration within an open, innovation driven ecosystem aligned with European digital rights.

Name: UP Economics Towards Consciousness
Description:
The UP Economics Towards Consciousness (UP ETC) is the sole official academic-political university-wide organization based in the UP School of Economics.

The late 70s saw social and political turmoil under the Marcos dictatorship, a turmoil under which the administration could neither hide behind the facades of peace and progress it sought to project nor through outright repression of dissent among people. It was in this context that twelve economics students led by founding Chairperson Orville Solon, former Dean of the UPSE Faculty, formally established then the UP Economics Towards Consciousness on February 10, 1979, seeking to debunk the mythical "golden age" of Marcos's economy.

Forty-two years later, UP ETC continues to produce quality leaders of the university and the nation, home to 3 UP Diliman University Student Council (USC) Chairpersons and an Associate Justice on the Supreme Court, among others. We take pride in honing leaders instilled with the values of being critical and assertive and working to achieve positive social change for the development of the academe and the Filipino community.

UP ETC is known for its many discussion groups, educational discussions, and other events that promote critical, rational analysis of social issues at the university, local, and national levels, using various fields of study, particularly economics. Among our flagship events are Kapekonomiya and Youth in Action.

In addition, every February, UP ETC celebrates its anniversary month called Consciousness Month, wherein we have a lineup of events that showcase the very best of what ETC has to offer.

Our understanding of partnership includes:
• Building complementary networks with business, politics, and academia in Switzerland and Croatia
• Promoting the professional expertise of our members through targeted opportunities
• Fostering continuous dialogue that inspires new ideas and enables joint projects

Join our network – to increase your visibility, be inspired, and actively shape the future. Together, we strengthen and develop the economic ties between Croatia and Switzerland.

Each platform has its unique features, pricing, and service offerings. It’s essential to compare the services provided by different platforms and select the one that best suits your needs and budget.

Types of Podcast Promotion Services

Email marketing is used to create and send newsletters, promotions, and updates about your podcast directly to your subscribed audience. Influencer partnerships involve collaborating with social media personalities to promote your podcast to their followers. Name: Aesop Industries
Description:
Aesop Industries is a human and economic performance company. If you look at the data of how we work and live, there is a strong argument that the current approach is not working. 

85% of employees are not engaged at work costing an estimated $7.8 trillion. 

58% of Americans experience loneliness which carries the same health impacts as smoking a pack of cigarettes per day. 

70% of Americans feel financially stressed. 

Depression is the leading cause of disability globally. 

Flat out, we are not doing great at this “humaning” thing and it is negatively impacting companies and cities. We need a revolution in human flourishing and we are here to lead the charge! 

We are a collective of companies designed in a way that unleashes the best in people and drives strong, vibrant economic outcomes for our clients. Our approach has the power to harmonize the economic and strategic goals of companies and cities with the profound human cravings that are currently going unmet in cities around the world. We are deploying a better way for people to plan and live their lives, for companies to design impactful employee programs, for real estate developers to rethink amenities, and for governments to approach economic development by looking at their communities from the bottom up rather than the top down. 

It is time for a better story and we are writing it.

Name: Circular Economy and Climate Change in Iraq
Description:
The Iraq Circular Economy and Climate Action Initiative is a pioneering project designed to address the urgent need for sustainable development in Iraq by integrating circular economy principles with climate change mitigation strategies. This initiative is focused on empowering Iraqi youth by providing them with specialized training in circular economy practices, equipping them with the knowledge and skills necessary to combat climate change effectively.

The project goes beyond mere training; it also includes supervision of youth-led projects dedicated to combating climate change through circular economy solutions. Participants will receive guidance in launching their own initiatives, from conception to execution, and will be supported in finding suitable opportunities for grants or loans. Additionally, the project will connect young entrepreneurs with potential investors who can help bring their ideas to fruition.

Graduates of the program will become part of a growing network of environmental and circular economy activists, drawn from both the private and public sectors. This network will include specialists, experts, and other stakeholders committed to advancing sustainable practices in Iraq. The initiative also aims to expand horizons by creating partnerships that open up new opportunities for Iraqi youth, enabling them to combat the effects of climate change while securing meaningful employment.

Supported and funded by ifa (Institut für Auslandsbeziehungen), the project benefits from the invaluable contributions of partners such as the Kurt Löwenstein Education Center, Betz, Cradle to Cradle NGO (C2C NGO), and the Bonyan Organization for Development and Education.  Dr. Firas Aljanabi from the Global Water and Climate Adaptation Centre (ABCD-Centre) at Technische Universität Dresden, as well as to DR Sameh Al-Muqdadi and Sanad .

MISI
Merujuk pada visi diatas, STIE IBMI merumuskan misi yang memuat tridharma sekolah tinggi dan sistem dukungan untuk pencapaian visi, yaitu STIE IBMI memiliki misi untuk menyelenggarakan, membina, dan mengembangkan :
a)Menyelenggarakan pembelajaran berbasis kompetensi yang berkualitas, inovatif, dan berakhlak dalam menemukan, mengembangkan, dan menerapkan rekayasa sistem informasi.

b)Pengembangan pembelajaran berbasis penjamin mutu.

c)Peningkatan kualitas kegiatan penelitian melalui pengembangan sistem informasi yang mendukung pembangunan berkelanjutan.

d)Pengembangan kegiatan pengabdian masyarakat sebagai upaya untuk meningkatkan peran aktif sekolah tinggi dalam penerapan hasil-hasil penelitian dibidang rekayasa sistem informasi dan mendukung pembangunan berkalanjutan.

e)Pengembangan kerjasama regional dan nasional yang berkualitas guna mendukung pelaksanaan Tridharma Sekolah Tinggi.

Name: Foundational Economy Alliance Wales Ltd
Description:
Foundational Alliance: We are an independent mission-driven, for public good, membership organisation.

Foundational Economy Alliance Wales Ltd is a Limited Company. Our Articles of Association (known as Rules) is available upon request. We are governed by a voluntary board.

Our Vision:
Our vision is more accessible and affordable essential goods and services, responsibly produced within planetary limit for every household across Wales.

Our Mission:
Our mission is to help the planners, funders and providers of essential goods and services to deliver what citizens need, successfully and sustainably - We do this through active members to whom we provide expertise, inspiration, profile raising and support for collaboration in three foundational ways of working:
1.	Context specific: engage with the specifics of sector and place
2.	Evidence based: base action on relevant evidence/ data
3.	Networked action : mobilise stakeholders vertically and horizontally

This effort is guided by our three shared aims: 
1.	Liveability for citizens through income and foundational provision
2.	Socially responsible and financially stable providers
3.	Foundational consumption and production within sustainable limits

Top 10 reasons to join up:

1.	Network, learn from and collaborate with organisations across the foundational sectors.
2.	Keep up to date with the latest thinking and best practice.
3.	Receive technical support, training opportunities and discount at events.
4.	Demonstrate leadership and commitment to foundational economic renewal.
5.	Promote your organisations at events and within our marketing materials.
6.	Influence government policy at all levels.
7.	Influence the Foundational Alliance’s strategy, actions, and governance.
8.	Help improve the quality and success of foundational goods and services.
9.	Become a partner in research and development projects.
10.	Help create a better Wales.

Name: Shreyas Trust
Description:
Founded by Mr. Seshadri & Dr. Iyer and based in Hyderabad, Shreyas Trust is a pioneering organization dedicated to cultivating a robust and inclusive innovation ecosystem. The Trust operates on a unique dual-front model, driving innovation within large corporations while simultaneously empowering grassroots entrepreneurship across the community.

On the Corporate Innovation front, Shreyas Trust partners with established companies to unlock their growth potential. Through bespoke programs like Intrapreneurship Accelerators, Corporate Accelerators for startup collaboration, strategic startup investing, and specialized training in cutting-edge fields like Generative AI, the Trust helps organizations solve critical business challenges, build a competitive edge, and foster a dynamic internal culture of innovation.

At the heart of its social mission is the Mass Entrepreneurship Program. Inspired by the goal of creating widespread economic resilience, this initiative focuses on creating, nurturing, and hand-holding a new generation of solopreneurs. Shreyas Trust provides aspiring individuals with a holistic support system, including business idea generation, operational training, financial literacy workshops, digital skills development, and access to grants and technology credits.

By bridging the gap between corporate boardrooms and grassroots innovators, Shreyas Trust is building a powerful, interconnected ecosystem that fuels economic growth, creates sustainable livelihoods, and positions Hyderabad as a leading hub for enterprise and innovation.

Name: National Scientific Centre "Institute of Agrarian Economics"
Free World Development
Description: Free World Development seeks to create a technological revolution in West Africa. We believe focusing on the core economic drivers and increasing their potential output by modernizing the overall infrastructure will help transition West Africa into a leading carbon neutral economy in the coming decade. To do this we are developing a food distribution and processing logistics system that will provide clean produce while managing the waste through the recycling and waste to energy process. Not only will we directly impact the food shortages and regional health crisis, we will create a new economy from a change in waste habits across the region. Africa is our home but the globe is our mission.

Hilltop Campus Village district, an historic commercial and residential area designated by Main Street Iowa, will continue efforts to re-establish itself as a vibrant area offering community services, shopping, dining, entertainment, and living options. Through interactive partnerships, the district will celebrate and enhance diversity, equity and inclusion, attracting and retaining a population living and working in the district, helping making its businesses financially stable and its neighborhoods safe and secure, providing both employment and a broader property  tax base (the better to direct public resources for infrastructure improvements.

The diverse educational, cultural and spiritual offerings in the district enhance its inclusive nature which, together with its safe an progressive transportation systems make it inviting for both pedestrians and bicyclists, and public and private transport. The revitalized mixed-use neighborhoods in this district will be family-friendly, clean and alive diverse activities and excitement.

The DSP now serves as a framework to guide strategy and implementation of projects that will help build an economically, socially and environmentally sustainable tourism economy in Taos. 

The Network is an initiative to collectively address the DSP, sponsored of the Town of Taos, Taos County, currently held as a contract managed by Taos Mainstreet.

Name: Asstio AB

Asstio ERP experter är ett innovativt företag som specialiserar sig på molnbaserade affärssystem och tillhörande tjänster. Vårt mål är att hjälpa företag att effektivisera sina arbetsprocesser genom automatisering av allt från orderhantering och inköp till fakturering och bokföring. Genom vår expertis och avancerade molnbaserade programvara kan ni följa er verksamhet i realtid med hjälp av detaljerad statistik och noggrann uppföljning.

Några av de mest påtagliga fördelarna med våra system inkluderar:
1. Snabbare leveransprocesser, både in och ut, helt utan manuellt arbete.
2. Digitaliserad fakturering och inköpsprocesser som sparar tid och minskar pappersanvändningen.
3. Kraftfull rapportering med moderna Business Intelligence-verktyg som Asstio Rapportering och PowerBI, vilket ger djupare insikter och bättre beslutsunderlag.

Name: Federation of Economic Development Association Dubai Chapter
Description:
The Federation of Economic Development Association of India (F.E.D.A) holds the distinction of being India's most venerable umbrella organization. F.E.D.A focused on promoting economic growth in India. Economic development professionals throughout the state, along with individuals and companies in related economic development fields, work together with the F.E.D.A Members and Board of Federation to help positively influence country legislation and industrial growth. With cutting edge policy research and advisory to National and State governments on trade issues. F.E.D.A is one of the leading non-profit organizations with established credentials for enhancing economic development.
In F.E.D.A our partner and member base comprise of a strong national as well as global network of entrepreneurs, businesses, investors and traders. Geographically, we have a reasonably strong base in many countries like India, China, UAE, Qatar, Canada, USA, Australia, and UK and have offices in all the major industrial provinces like New Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Kolkata, Mumbai and Dubai, Alberta-Canada. The India offices have been regularly facilitating high level delegations ‘to and from’ many countries on trade and economic summits of national, bilateral and economic importance.

Name: ILE - Instituto Liberdade Econômica
Description:
O Instituto Liberdade Econômica (ILE) é uma associação sem fins lucrativos dedicada à promoção da liberdade econômica, ao estímulo ao empreendedorismo e à melhoria do ambiente de negócios no Brasil. Com foco na pesquisa, debate e influência, buscamos contribuir para o desenvolvimento político e social brasileiro, rumo a uma sociedade mais solidária, justa e equitativa.

Nossas ações abrangem a defesa de ideais de liberdade econômica, tanto nacional quanto internacionalmente, além do monitoramento do Executivo e Legislativo, identificando propostas que impactem positiva ou negativamente quem gera emprego e renda. Atuamos também no desenvolvimento e gestão de políticas públicas, colaborando com agentes públicos e privados, e fomentando a inovação através da conexão entre empresas e startups.

A educação financeira é um dos pilares fundamentais do ILE. Acreditamos que, ao capacitar as futuras gerações para lidar com questões financeiras de maneira consciente e responsável, contribuímos para um país mais próspero e sustentável. Além disso, trabalhamos para reduzir o tamanho do Estado na vida do cidadão e promover um ambiente favorável aos negócios e à livre iniciativa.

O ILE, busca estabelecer parcerias estratégicas com diversas instituições e organizações para ampliar sua atuação e promover ações conjuntas em prol do crescimento econômico e social do Brasil. Nosso compromisso é com o avanço da liberdade econômica e a construção de um futuro mais promissor para todos os brasileiros.

Junte-se a nós e faça parte desta importante transformação. Siga o ILE no LinkedIn para se manter atualizado sobre nossas iniciativas, eventos e novidades. Juntos, podemos fazer a diferença no cenário econômico e social do nosso país.

Name: ElderCare Project
Description:
The ElderCare project addresses the growing challenge of dementia in the cross-border area of Pella in Greece and  Negotino  in North Macedonia. In both regions, the number of elderly people living with dementia is rising, while access to specialised care remains limited—particularly in North Macedonia, where services are fragmented and support systems for families are scarce. ElderCare introduces an innovative, community-based approach designed to improve the quality of life for people with dementia, their caregivers, and elderly individuals at high risk of developing the condition.

Partners:
Municipality of Pella (Lead Beneficiary)
Greek Association of Alzheimer's disease and related disorders
Public Health Institution "Negotino Public Health Clinic"
Municipality of Negotino
Institute for Alzheimer's Disease and Neuroscience (IAN) Skopje

Le Cairn, la monnaie locale du bassin de vie grenoblois !

L’association porteuse du Cairn a vu le jour en 2015 de la volonté d’un groupe de citoyens de lancer une monnaie locale sur le bassin de vie grenoblois. La monnaie est entrée effectivement en circulation à l’automne 2017.

L’ensemble du réseau Cairn a vocation à tendre vers ses objectifs :

-Favoriser l’activité économique locale de la Région grenobloise
-Établir la confiance et encourager l’entraide entre tous les utilisateurs
-Dynamiser l’économie réelle et résister à la spéculation
-Soutenir la transition énergétique et respecter l’environnement
-Permettre au citoyen de s’impliquer dans la gouvernance de sa monnaie

Name: Advancing Health Equity & Diagnostic Technologies in Georgia
Description:
The Advancing Health Equity and Diagnostic Technologies in Georgia Innovation Engine was formed through the generous support of an NSF Regional Innovation Engine development award. This statewide technology-driven innovation ecosystem creates a novel partnership across healthcare payers (such as health plan providers, employers, Medicare, Medicaid), technology developers, and healthcare providers to stimulate innovation-driven economic growth throughout Georgia. 

We invite you to join us as we pursue the next phase of NSF funding for this program - with potential NSF investments of up to $160 million over 10 years - to implement ambitious ecosystem plans.

According to a 2023 report, over 9.5 million Georgians, or 88% of the state’s population, are currently covered by some form of health insurance. However, approximately half of this insured group, or 4.75 million residents, lack healthcare availability or underutilize healthcare services, including diagnostic, screening, and remote monitoring technology.  

With technology-driven capabilities serving as its fuel, this statewide Engine will steer impactful innovation-driven growth by capitalizing on existing reimbursement plans for diagnostic, screening, and remote monitoring technologies and on the financial incentivization provided to insurance companies to improve patient access to the same.  These incentives are even greater when testing is directly coupled with improved access to care, quality of care, and a reduction of chronic disease impact. 

Through early detection and increasingly preventative services - enhanced by diagnostic, screening, and disease monitoring technologies - this statewide Innovation Engine will develop a set of programs and initiatives that will provide state-of-the-art home- and community-based services in close partnership with payers, employers, and providers.

Name: Ruaha Energy
Description:
Ruaha Energy | Powering Rural Africa Beyond Electricity

Ruaha Energy drives economic development in rural Sub-Saharan Africa by delivering more than power. We design and deploy renewable mini-grids (solar, hydro, hybrid) and build ecosystems that enable communities to thrive with:

 Clean Energy Access – reliable electricity for homes, schools, clinics, and businesses.
 Productive Use Equipment (PUE) & Microfinancing – tools like milling machines, cold storage, and smart cooking stoves made accessible with affordable finance.
 Digital Tools & Smart Infrastructure – mobile-first platforms that connect farmers and entrepreneurs to data, markets, and global supply chains.

With active projects in Tanzania’s Rungwe District and a growing pipeline across Africa, our work is supported by leading development partners including Innovate UK, REA, and REPP.

Our mission is clear:
 One million customers, one village at a time.

We don’t just light up villages—we help them leap ahead, creating jobs, raising incomes, and building resilient, sustainable rural economies.

Name: UFUMI CULTURE
Description:
Ufumi Culture is a social enterprise dedicated to empowering women and families in marginalized communities across Kenya. At our core, we provide sustainable income opportunities through traditional crafts, while driving community development in education, healthcare, and environmental resilience.

Our strength lies in adapting to each community’s unique needs:

- In Taita Taveta, weaving provides livelihoods where farming is threatened by wildlife.

- In Lodwar, our vision is to establish community centres where women can weave in safe spaces, access maternity care, and ensure their children receive an education.

- In Kibera, recycled paper becomes handbags that generate value from waste.

No matter the approach, the mission remains the same: to lift families out of poverty and create resilient, self-sustaining communities.

Through bulk orders, global partnerships, and grants, Ufumi connects African craftsmanship with worldwide markets—transforming heritage into impact.

Weave Change with Ufumi. 
Join us in empowering communities and shaping a sustainable future.

Name: Oregon Economic Development Districts
Description:
Oregon Economic Development Districts (OEDD) helps to mobilize the resources, technical assistance, strategic planning and project coordination services needed to make Oregon businesses and communities thrive. Oregon's 12 unique economic development districts cover the state's 9 federally-recognized Tribes, 36 counties, 297 municipalities, and numerous unincorporated communities — all working to provide effective, efficient delivery of economic development services within their regions. OEDD brings these districts together and offers a statewide, strategic platform for cross regional collaboration, information sharing, training, and funding coordination.

Economic development districts are an important part of our state's economic infrastructure — part of a nationwide network of over 380 districts across the country designated and funded in part by the U.S. Economic Development Administration. EDDs take a long-term, holistic approach to regional and community development, looking at the distinct opportunities and challenges that face each part of our state. EDDs facilitate the strategies, solutions and partnerships necessary to address needs around environmental stewardship, infrastructure upgrades, intermodal transportation systems, affordable and quality housing, workforce building, child care, small business development, and so much more.

Name: Perry Economic Development
Description:
Perry Economic Development partners with the city of Perry and others.  We are a catalyst organization that supports and facilitates the sustainable growth and development of the city.

Vision Statement
Perry is a progressive, financially viable, and diverse community; we advance the financial, social, and environmental well-being of our citizens and businesses, and we are development-ready, technology-savvy, entrepreneurial and innovation-friendly.

Hotel Pattee Public/Private Partnership 
Perry Economic Development announced the completion of the purchase of Hotel Pattee and LaPoste in April of 2021. The purchase was a conclusion to the agreement Perry Industries, Inc. (“PEDI”) and Perry Economic Development, Inc. (PED) had with Maxwell Hospitality, LLC and HPLP, LLC. to acquire the Hotel Pattee and La Poste assets.

A unique public private-partnership model for the purchase and operation of the properties enabled this opportunity for the community. As the sponsoring organizations of this effort, the City of Perry has made an initial economic contribution of over $650,000 and Perry Economic Development made its own $300,000 donation.

The crucial leadership gift in this campaign came in early March from Osmundson Mfg. Co. in the amount of $500,000. We also received a major $300,000 gift from the Wiese Foundation. In total, the cash contributions and pledges for this project have now reached $1.6 million of the $2.35 million private fundraising campaign goal (excluding the public City of Perry contributions).

This generational purchase opportunity will position the Hotel Pattee and LaPoste as locally-owned and operated, solidifying the long-term viability of these critical community assets. Renovated in 1993 as one of the finest boutique hotels in the U.S., Hotel Pattee remains a very significant economic asset to Perry, bringing as many as 65,000 people per year. LaPoste provides a grand venue for several special events each year.

Name: Empire Economic Consulting
Description:
אמפייר ייעוץ כלכלי – מגשרים בין אסטרטגיה לביצוע

אמפייר מספקת ייעוץ כלכלי-אסטרטגי לארגונים ועסקים המבקשים להתמודד עם אתגרים מורכבים ולהפוך חזון לתוכניות פעולה מעשיות.

תחומי המומחיות שלנו:

ניתוח כלכלי מעמיק – פיתוח ואנליזה של מודלים כלכליים מורכבים המאפשרים קבלת החלטות מושכלת מבוססת-נתונים

חשיבה אסטרטגית ארגונית – הבנה מעמיקה של מטרות הארגון והצרכים הייחודיים שלו ובניית אסטרטגיות מותאמות לצמיחה ושינוי

גישור בין מגזרים – מינוף ניסיון ייחודי בצמתים הקריטיים של המשק הישראלי, בממשל ובעסקים, ליצירת פתרונות פרקטיים

ניהול רפורמות ושינויים מבניים – ליווי תהליכי שינוי ארגוניים מורכבים מהתכנון ועד ליישום

הניסיון שלנו:

אמפייר הוקמה על ידי אלי מורגנשטרן, יועץ כלכלי-אסטרטגי בכיר עם ניסיון של שנים בניהול תקציבים של עשרות מיליארדי שקלים, הובלת רפורמות משמעותיות במגזר הציבורי, וניהול משברים לאומיים. 

ניסיונו כולל תפקידי מפתח באגף התקציבים במשרד האוצר (רכז חינוך, מים, חקלאות, תעופה ורפרנט תחבורה), וכן תפקידי ניהול בכירים במגזר הפרטי והציבורי. השילוב הזה מעניק פרספקטיבה רחבה והבנה עמוקה של דינמיקות ארגוניות ורגולטוריות.

למי אנחנו מתאימים?

ארגונים עסקיים, גופים ציבוריים, וחברות הנמצאים בצמתי החלטה אסטרטגיים – בין אם מדובר בהתמודדות עם שינויים רגולטוריים, תכנון אסטרטגי רב-שנתי, ניתוח היתכנות כלכלית, או ניהול משברים ארגוניים.
