Name: Connect Poland Prize
Description:
Connect Poland Prize is an acceleration program that aims to support foreign start-ups to develop their business in Poland.

For whom is the Connect Poland Prize project created?
The Connect Poland Prize Accelerator is addressed to start-up teams coming from abroad (outside Poland), which, by applying to the program, are declaring their willingness to establish and register a company on the territory of Poland.
The program invites originators operating in the areas of: Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT), bioeconomy, pharmaceutical biotechnology, but also accepts solutions that are in line with the scope of the National Smart Specializations (NSS) - https://smart.gov.pl/en/.
What does a start-up receive?
 financial support (I stage: max 50K PLN; II stage: max PLN 250K)
 equity-free Acceleration and Soft-landing programs
 expert support during the entire development process
 the possibility of attracting investors and business partners
… and more!

More information on: https://polandprize.lpnt.eu

Project Connect Poland Prize co-financed by the European Union through the European Regional Development Fund within the Smart Growth Operational Programme 2014–2020, Priority Axis II: Support for the environment and capacity of enterprise for R&D&I activity, Measure 2.5 Acceleration Programmes-  Poland Prize
Project value: 10 136 815 PLN
Participation of the European Union: 9 732 452 PLN

Name: Sanford Regional Economic Growth Council
Description:
The Sanford Regional Economic Growth Council (SREGC) is a partnership  of the City of Sanford, the Sanford-Springvale Chamber of Commerce and the Industrial Development Corporation of Sanford. This evolving organization is chartered to be the leading economic development organization in central York County  and has   embarked  on an aggressive and cutting-edge strategy to increase the prosperity of its citizens and enhance the area's economy.  
 
Our goal is to  facilitate the economic  growth in the region, with a particular focus on new job creation. As such, we concentrate on assisting local businesses grow, recruiting new business to the region  and facilitating new business formation. Our services are broad-based and include:  site location assistance, providing comprehensive demographic and labor market information, financial packaging, connecting business clients to appropriate tax incentives, catalyzing inter-governmental relations and providing leadership in business advocacy and public  policy issues such as  infrastructure improvement and maximizing public and private investment in our region.

When it comes to business and economic development we are the region’s  “go to” resource.

En sparringspartner med forretningsforståelse

Name: The Qii Institute
Description:
The term "quantum" refers to a profound shift or a complex system where small changes can have large-scale effects.
(1) Disruptive or revolutionary: A "quantum leap" suggests a significant, sudden, and transformative change.
(2) Minimal but impactful: A "quantum improvement" implies a small change that leads to a disproportionately large result.
(3) Complex and interconnected: A "quantum system" can refer to a complex system with many interconnected parts.

Name: Ecosectoria
Description:
Ecosectoria est une plateforme d'analyse des dynamiques économiques et des enjeux financiers contemporains  conçues pour les entrepreneurs, les professionnels, les étudiants, les décideurs et l’ensemble des parties prenantes, qui à pour but d'aider à prendre des décisions stratégiques.


Dans un monde en constante évolution, il est essentiel pour les décideurs, partie prenantes et entreprises de comprendre les dynamiques économiques et les enjeux financiers contemporains. Cette plateforme d'analyse offre des outils et des ressources pour naviguer à travers les complexités du paysage économique actuel. 

En fournissant des analyses approfondies, des études de cas et des projections de tendances, elle permet aux utilisateurs de prendre des décisions éclairées basées sur des données pertinentes et actualisées. 

De plus, grâce à des séminaires et des webinaires interactifs, les participants peuvent échanger des idées et bénéficier des perspectives d'experts du secteur. Que ce soit pour anticiper les fluctuations du marché ou pour optimiser les stratégies d'investissement, cette plateforme se positionne comme un atout indispensable pour tous ceux qui souhaitent réussir dans un environnement économique dynamique.

Name: The Corridor Economy Forum
Description:
**The Corridor Economy Forum** is a strategic business and policy platform dedicated to unlocking Zambia’s industrial, trade, and export potential along its emerging **economic transport corridors**, particularly the **Lobito Corridor and the TAZARA Railway Corridor**.

The Forum brings together **entrepreneurs, SMEs, captains of industry, manufacturers, financiers, policymakers, development institutions, embassies, and investors** to reimagine how infrastructure can be converted into **productive economic engines**. Our focus is on value addition, industrialisation, agro-processing, logistics, manufacturing, tourism, mining services, and export-oriented enterprises.

At the heart of The Corridor Economy Forum is a simple but powerful idea: **Zambia must move from being a transit economy and consumer market to a producer and net exporter of finished goods** for regional and global markets, including Africa, Asia, the Middle East, Europe, and beyond.

Through **forums, fireside chats, research insights, stakeholder engagements, and digital communities**, we:

* Map high-impact business opportunities along railway and logistics corridors
* Connect SMEs and entrepreneurs to markets, finance, and technical support
* Facilitate dialogue between the private sector and policymakers
* Promote investment-ready industrial hubs, logistics nodes, and boom towns
* Champion “Proudly Zambian” manufacturing and export growth

The Corridor Economy Forum is not just a conversation platform — it is a **catalyst for collaboration, investment, and execution**.

**Building corridors. Creating industries. Manufacturing prosperity.**
#TheCorridorEconomy #ZambiaSMEs #Industrialisation #TradeAndInvestment #AfricanGrowth

The UK’s fastest growing region, it is already home to leading companies such as Google, AstraZeneca, GlaxoSmithKline, Microbiotica, Public Health England’s HQ, Kao Park and Kao’s advanced data centre.

The Innovation Core offers access to a network of world-class companies, institutions, and academia with groundbreaking ideas at their heart. Our Mission:

The mission of Vre Lavi Ayiti is founded on the principles of sustainability and empowerment. Vre Lavi Ayiti mission is to encourage, educate and empower the people of Haiti so that they are a successful and self-sustaining community.

Our Vision:

It is Vre Lavi Ayiti vision to encourage the people of Haiti to greater self sufficiency. By supporting the development of their local resources through education and economic opportunity we will support the establishment of a strong, independent community that will form a progressive bond with each other and extend through-out the region.

Vre Lavi Ayiti desires to improve environmental, agricultural and economic conditions in Haiti. Whether you already have an idea or you’re starting from zero, we give you a simple roadmap and the support you need to start, raise money and scale something meaningful.

Our process helps you:

• Identify a real problem you can solve
• Turn your skills and passion into a powerful idea
• Build a clear plan you can start immediately
• Launch your business or nonprofit step-by-step
• Learn how to raise money and grow faster
• Connect to training, funding and community opportunities

The goal is simple:
to help you build wealth for yourself and create impact in your community.

We believe every young person has talent, ideas and lived experiences that can be transformed into real solutions. You don’t need money to begin. You don’t need a perfect idea. You just need the right guidance.

If you’re ready to start something real — or scale what you’ve already begun — the Young Wealth Creators Program is here to help you move forward.

Join us.
Build something that matters.
Start building your future today.

Name: Oklahoma City Film & Creative Industries Office
Description:
The Oklahoma City Film & Creative Industries Office, a member of both the Association of Film Commissioners International and Film USA, is the central point of contact for entertainment productions wanting to film in the city.  We support a workforce in the Greater OKC area that spans a seven-county area to include Canadian, Cleveland, Grady, Lincoln, Logan, McClain, and Oklahoma Counties.  We promote the central Oklahoma region as the premiere destination for motion picture, television, and commercial productions in the state of Oklahoma.

The Oklahoma City Film & Creative Industries Office was established in 2022 as a partnership between the City of Oklahoma City and the Greater Oklahoma City Chamber, with an emphasis on economic development, inclusivity, and creation of a thriving production environment.  In addition to the State of Oklahoma’s rebate program, the City of Oklahoma City offers a cash rebate available to qualifying productions. The city rebate can be combined with the state program, creating a highly competitive incentive package.

Our office functions as a liaison between film companies and the City of Oklahoma City and other nearby regional city governments.  We also provide a roster of other services to include:
 

Oklahoma City Film Incentive Program Administration

Supporting and connecting productions with local resources

Initial Location Scouting of OKC’s diverse neighborhoods and increasingly vibrant urban landscapes

Online Directory - Greater OKC crew and support service companies

Online Photo Gallery - OKC Locations

Lodging Assistance

Production office resource assistance

Official OKC Film Office Letter of Support for OKC City permitting process

Online newsletter providing updates on the OKC film and creative industries

Name: GƏLƏCƏK ÜÇÜN ASSOSİASİYALAR AKADEMİYASI - AFA
Description:
AMFA-led consortium members of USAID Associations for the Future Activity (USAID AFA), through continued co-creation, will collectively design solutions to specific development challenges of Business and Professional Associations in Azerbaijan by increasing beneficiary associations’ capacity to deliver services innovatively, represent member businesses or professionals, expand inclusive economic opportunities, and contribute to achieving economic prosperity and well-being.    

The activities’ core research questions will be the following:
1.	How can Azerbaijani associations effectively serve and deliver greater value to local businesses and entrepreneurs?
2.	How can associations represent and advocate for all members/businesses?
3.	How can the learning be replicated and applied in the future to a wider context?

The consortium will use participatory processes to engage partners, potential implementers, and end-users to define a problem collaboratively, identify new and existing solutions, build consensus around action, and refine plans to move forward with programs and projects.

Name: Fostoria Economic Development

Our mission is two-fold: to nurture existing businesses and industries, while also actively seeking opportunities to diversify our local economy, create high-quality employment opportunities, and assist industries in their growth and expansion efforts.

HOW WE LIVE OUR MISSION

FEDC operates at the epicenter of a dynamic network of strategic partnerships, united in our shared vision to meet the evolving needs of businesses and industries. Nestled within the Fostoria Learning Center, alongside the Fostoria Area Chamber of Commerce & Visitors Bureau and Fostoria Community Improvement Corporation, we form a cohesive force driving economic, community, and workforce development initiatives. Our collaborative approach, guided by a joint strategic plan, ensures efficiency and effectiveness in our endeavors.

Through these strategic alliances, coupled with our engagement with local businesses, industries, the City of Fostoria, and governmental authorities, FEDC champions a resilient and competitive environment for economic growth. We leverage these partnerships to pursue pivotal initiatives aimed at maximizing our impact. From addressing workforce and training needs to nurturing small businesses, entrepreneurial ventures, and assisting large industries in their growth and expansion efforts, enhancing quality of life, fostering sustainability, and aligning public programs with local business requirements, FEDC is unwavering in its commitment to advancing the economic prosperity of the Fostoria area.

Name: Big Table Institute
Description:
At the Big Table Institute, we connect and empower civic builders and mission-driven professionals to collaboratively create transformative, market-driven change in their communities.

Our programming embraces a shift from siloed to networked models. It is rooted in user-centered design, cross-sector collaboration, and shared value creation. We go beyond the traditional startup or small business playbook to enable mission-aligned professionals to design, test, and launch systemic solutions.

Name: Don't Waste Durham, Inc.
Description:
We create solutions that prevent trash and power the circular economy.

—GreenToGo (est. 2017): an award-winning reusable container system that takes the trash out of takeout. Customers get to-go food in durable, reusable containers from our partner restaurants and grocery stores city-wide. They return used containers to any of the return stations across the city. We pick up, wash, and deliver.
—GreenToGo Wash Services: Contact us if you’re a maker, food producer, school, office, or venue that wants to switch from disposable to reusable.
—GreenToGo Dinner Club, launched in Nov. 2020 to support the local Durham restaurant community during tough times. Each event pairs one neighborhood and one restaurant, giving the restaurant a single mass order that brings them a much-needed boost in earnings. 
—The ReCirculation Project is a circular economy innovation to test our hypothesis: Can the recycling industry’s existing infrastructure be adapted to recover and redistribute durable, reusable materials? Our first pilot test's results were highlighted by Innovate Durham, EPA’s America Recycles Innovation Expo, Otronicon Technology Conference, and the 2019 All Things Open conference.
—Our Reducing Waste in Durham Schools team is made up of students, parents, teachers, and community members who care about making our schools less wasteful and more sustainable. Our current main focus: ensuring DPS is actively working toward a functioning recycling program.
—Our proposed $.10 fee on single-use bags passed the Durham Environmental Affairs Board (EAB) by unanimous resolution in August 2019. We are now building a coalition of ally organizations to support passage of a local law, and incorporating the bag fee into broader plastic waste prevention policy. Our Bull City Boomerang Bag innovation is making free, equitable access to reusable bags a city-wide NORM.
—We coordinate a steering committee for the NC state food waste reduction bill, HB 1119, led by House Rep. Zack Hawkins.

Name: Nevada 95-80 Regional Development Authority
Description: The Nevada 95-80 Regional Development Authority is the state-designated Regional Development Authority (RDA) for the counties of Pershing and Humboldt and the cities of Lovelock and Winnemucca. Established in 2021, the organization works with the Governor’s Office of Economic Development to expedite business development, incentives, and community capacity. We support businesses via state and local resources as well as mutually beneficial partners with a goal to achieve successful growth and sustainability of the region’s economic ecosystem.

Name: Wirtschaftsförderung Hersfeld-Rotenburg
Description:
Wirtschaft stärken. Zukunft gestalten. Hersfeld-Rotenburg.

Stell dir vor, du hast eine Idee, ein Unternehmen oder ein Vorhaben – und genau die richtigen Menschen an deiner Seite, um es voranzubringen.

Menschen, die nicht nur verstehen, wie Wirtschaft funktioniert, sondern wie die Region funktioniert. Und wie beides zusammen stark wird.

Wir sind die Wirtschaftsförderungsgesellschaft für den Landkreis Hersfeld-Rotenburg – kurz: WFG HEF-ROF.

Aber wir sind mehr als nur das!

Wir sind Möglichmacher. Verknüpfer. Impulsgeber. Für Gründer:innen, Unternehmen, Investierende, Kommunen und alle, die in unserer Region etwas bewegen wollen.

 Du willst dein Unternehmen weiterentwickeln?
 Du suchst den idealen Standort?
 Du brauchst ein Netzwerk, das Türen öffnet?

Dann bist du hier richtig.

Denn wir glauben: Starke Wirtschaft beginnt im Lokalen. Und wächst mit den richtigen Partnern.

Folge uns für Einblicke, Erfolgsgeschichten, Fördertipps und echte Menschen aus der Region – und werde Teil eines Netzwerks, das Hersfeld-Rotenburg bewegt.

Name: Club des Entreprises du Val de Sarthe
Description:
Le Club des Entreprises du Val de Sarthe rassemble les dirigeants du territoire autour d’un objectif clair : développer leur activité.
À travers des rencontres régulières, des échanges d’expériences concrètes et des événements ciblés, le Club favorise les opportunités business, le partage de bonnes pratiques et le renforcement du réseau local, dans un cadre professionnel et convivial.

Description: Studying economics is for anyone who wants to learn how the world works. Studying economics at Minnesota helps develop the analytical and creative thinking skills to push the frontier of our understanding.

Description:

Name: Control Edge
Description:
Control Edge är ett modernt och molnbaserat ekonomisystem för företag med komplexa ekonomiprocesser. Byggt på det välkända ekonomisystemet Visma Control, men i en ny, modern version med förbättrad och mer avancerad funktionalitet.

Vårt ekonomisystem har ett starkt ekosystem som erbjuder ett brett utbud av tilläggstjänster som bidrar till en starkare helhetslösning och ytterligare optimering. Control Edge kan enkelt hantera avancerade API integrationer, t.ex. fastighetssystem, BI-system och lönesystem.

Control Edge är en del av den stora techkoncernen Visma vilket innebär att vårt ekonomisystem uppfyller höga kvalitets- och säkerhetskrav.

Description: TOOL4LIFE was conceived to address the issues of sustainability in a fundamental pre-processing step for the composite manufacturing, actively contributing to the effective reduction of CO2 emissions, energy savings, inferior landfilling, and the creation of healthier world for citizen.  Nous sommes convaincus que vous avez besoin de nous à vos côtés, non seulement en tant que prestataire de services, mais plus en qualité de partenaire. Un partenaire qui vous comprend et sur qui vous pouvez entièrement compter. 


 Fort de plusieurs années d’expérience en organisation de salon international professionnel, nous sommes votre meilleur atout pour vos projets de communications événementielles.

 Nous nous faisons déjà une joie de vous compter parmi les nôtres à cette occasion. Honorez-nous de votre présence, venez apporter votre pierre à l’édifice!

Name: Darien McIntosh County Chamber of Commerce
Description:
Our goal is to cultivate a community where businesses desire to operate, people are enthusiastic to visit, and where everyone wants to live! We are advocates, the voices and energy of our communities- a vital facet in economic development and impact.

The Darien – McIntosh Chamber of Commerce is the voice of business and business owners. On behalf of our members, we actively engage in communication with government representatives at the local and state levels to advocate in creating economic stability and consistent growth.

The mission of the Darien – McIntosh County Chamber of Commerce is to promote economic growth, represent the business community and enhance the quality of life while protecting our cultural and natural resources in Coastal Georgia.

Description: Redwood Region RISE (Resilient Inclusive Sustainable Economy) is a coalition of 150+ member organizations engaging over a thousand residents across Tribal Lands, Del Norte, Humboldt, Lake, and Mendocino Counties. Together, we've created and are now implementing our 10-year Regional Roadmap: a community- and data-driven plan to bring sustainable, quality jobs to our region while advancing environmental stewardship and social equity through the statewide California Jobs First initiative.

Name: Andes Value Research (AVR)
Description:
AVR es una empresa especializada en atracción de inversiones productivas que opera bajo la lógica de aceleración del proceso de desarrollo territorial. AVR diseña e implementa estrategias y programas de fomento y promoción de inversiones, apoyando en la generación de políticas públicas, identificando oportunidades de alto potencial, fomentando la innovación, fortaleciendo la competitividad territorial y facilitando el acceso de inversiones a empresas con interés en triple impacto económicos, sociales y ambientales.

El enfoque que plantea el modelo de AVR considera la atracción de capitales, tecnologías y conocimientos que sofistican la matriz de transformación productiva de sectores locales y facilitan su acceso a nuevos mercados, promoviendo negocios e inversiones económicamente rentables, socialmente inclusivas y ambientalmente responsables. 

AVR provee servicios a organismos de cooperación internacional, gobiernos locales y nacionales, agencias de desarrollo económico y empresas privadas individuales y colectivas de América Latina interesadas en generar mayores y mejores beneficios económicos y sociales con estándares de cuidado y respeto al medio ambiente, de acuerdo con los nuevos estándares globales y a las nuevas tendencias de consumo. El sitio web de la compañía es www.andesvalue.com

Name: Lucas County Department of Planning & Development
Description:
Welcome to the hub of workforce and economic development in Lucas County. We collaborate with governmental bodies, non-profits, and commercial entities to offer comprehensive services for both employers and job seekers.

OhioMeansJobs Center
Our OhioMeansJobs Center specializes in skill development. If you’re looking to enhance your skillset or find a new career, we're your resource. For more details, visit omjlc.com. As a part of our one-stop system our programs are designed to create a seamless experience for job seekers and employers alike. 

Collaborative Service
We work closely with service providers to assist job seekers in finding optimal employment and to help current workers progress in their careers. We also support businesses in recruiting skilled employees. Whether you're a fresh graduate or a seasoned executive, or whether you represent a startup or a large corporation, we’ve got you covered.

Workforce Development Board
Our initiatives are guided by the Lucas County Workforce Development Board, an ensemble of leaders from business, education, and community sectors. Their collective wisdom ensures that we tailor our services to the unique needs of our community and its workforce.

Mission & Vision
Mission: To deliver innovative workforce solutions that boost regional economic growth and individual prosperity.

Vision: To achieve regional economic prosperity through a trained, diverse, and career-ready workforce.

To learn more about our services, visit workreadylucascounty.com.

Name: Canadian Young Economic Forum (CYEF)
Description: The Canadian Young Economic Forum (CYEF) aims to unite the brightest young minds across Canada to tackle pressing economic issues and generate job opportunities for young people in Canada. Through a dynamic integration of skills development, unparalleled opportunities, and motivation, CYEF cultivates a community of visionary leaders poised to shape the future of the Canadian economy.

Name: Startup Wyoming | Helping Wyoming Founders Build
Description:
Startup Wyoming is a statewide initiative committed to empowering founders who are building Wyoming’s next generation of innovation-driven companies. Launched through a collaboration between the Wyoming Business Council and Silicon Couloir, we are creating a unified front to spark bold ideas, foster meaningful collaboration, and support high-growth potential ventures across the state.

Our mission is clear: support founders with the ambition and potential to scale. Whether you’re validating an idea, navigating early traction, preparing for investment, or pushing toward rapid expansion, we’re here to help you go further.

We connect Wyoming founders to the right people, capital strategies, and statewide resources, removing barriers, opening doors, and amplifying opportunities. Through hands-on support, powerful networks, and a shared commitment to innovation, we’re putting Wyoming’s innovation-driven startups on the map and strengthening the state’s entrepreneurial future.

If you’re a founder with the drive to build something transformative, Startup Wyoming is your partner in momentum. Let’s spark what’s next!

Name: Maasai Mara University Economics Student Association(MMUESA)
Description:
Welcome to Maasai Mara University Economics Student Association  where theory meets practice and passion drives progress .Join us in exploring the intricate world of economics through engaging discussions ,workshops and events. Connect with like minded peers ,expand your knowledge and unlock opportunities to apply economic principles to real world challenges.
Our association provides dynamic platform for growth ,collaboration and professional development.
Elevate your academic journey and shape the future of economics with us

Name: Nasarawa NG-CARES Programme
Description:
NG-CARES is a programme designed to restore the livelihoods of the poor and vulnerable and maintain food security. The programme aligns with the Nasarawa State Economic Development Strategy (NEDS) to respond to the current economic crisis in Nasarawa State.

The vision underlying the NG-CARES Programme is to ensure that best practices from existing Community Driven Development (CDD) Approach and Social Protection (SP) Programme are sustained and the structures already established are maintained.  This is to ensure that poverty reduction strategies adopted by the government is strengthened with a strong desire and focus on service delivery to the poor and vulnerable people.  

This economic programme is implemented by the State Cash Transfer Unit (SCTU), Community and Social Development Agency (CSDA) and State FADAMA Coordinating Office (SFCO).

Areas of programme intervention include; social transfers support to livelihoods of poor and vulnerable individuals who are chronically ill, aged and living with a disability, public workfare for poor and vulnerable youths and women from communities (with the state social register), micro projects to poor communities with basic infrastructures in education, health, nutrition, water and sanitation, provision of farm inputs and services such as seed, fertilizer and herbicides to poor individuals from farming communities, provision of farmer assets for production to add value to harvested farm yields and mitigate food wastages to poor farming associations from communities, rehabilitation of rural roads and provision of access to poor and rural farming communities from the farmlands to (sales) markets, and wet markets support through water and sanitation infrastructures to conform to the covid-19 realities.

Name: Stroud District: The Natural Place
Description:
Stroud District’s green economy sets it apart from the rest of the UK. As recycling was just entering the public consciousness, wind turbines were starting to turn in Stroud. Our progressive and dynamic approach to green energy was ignited years before it was part of the national conversation.

We are home to Britain’s greenest energy company, Ecotricity, launched here in 1995 and the world’s greenest football club, Forest Green Rovers.

The global movement, Extinction Rebellion was founded here. Whatever your approach to tackling the climate emergency, every single one of us needs to act.

Stroud District is leading the way. We’re proud to be activists. Stroud District Council was one of the first local authorities in the UK to declare a climate emergency in 2018 and made a commitment to do ‘everything within the council’s power’ for the district to become carbon neutral by 2030. We’re well on the way.

Stroud is the natural place to locate a green tech or climate conscious organisation.

Name: Macomb Area Economic Development Corporation
Description:
Macomb is located in West Central Illinois and is equidistant (three hours) between Chicago and St. Louis.  Plus, there's twice daily Amtrak service to Chicago.  Macomb is a mix of agriculture, higher education, commerce and industry and is home to two educational institutions: Western Illinois University and Spoon River College.  Additionally, McDonough District Hospital provides an impressive spectrum of advanced medical treatments and personalized health services throughout the region. Macomb residents and visitors alike have ready access to numerous cultural, academic, and recreational venues throughout the city.  MAEDCO (an economic development organization) is a not-for-profit, public/private corporation providing a full range of services to help meet growing business’ needs in the city. MAEDCO provides direct professional and technical assistance to large and small businesses throughout McDonough County, Illinois.

Services Include:
•  Business Attraction
•  Business Retention & Expansion 
•  Access to Capital / Revolving Loan Fund   
•  Workforce Development
•  Youth Entrepreneurship
•  Enterprise Zone, TIF District

Name: Main Street Mile Initiative
Description: The Main Street Mile Initiative is a plan for community and economic development in Upland, Indiana launched by a remarkable $30 million College and Community Collaboration Grant from the Lilly Endowment and matched by an additional $70 million in private investment, partnerships, and grants facilitated by Taylor University. Plans call for a new collegiate inn, guest cottages, expansion of the public library, a destination restaurant, downtown mixed-use buildings, apartments, an active-adult neighborhood, single family homes, a park, trails, and more.

Name: VLC City Lab

Impulsado por la Fundación València Innovation Capital y dinamizado por The MotherTrees Innovation Ecosystem, VLC City Lab es la iniciativa donde la colaboración se convierte en pilotos que benefician a las empresas, la ciudad y sus habitantes.

Name: AGRI CAMP
Description:
Innovative Agriculture Training and Learning Camp (AGRI CAMP) strives to promote the development of innovative agriculture in Armenia by fostering triangular partnership between industry sector, students, young professionals and agripreneurs through hands-on and innovative agricultural training and skills building as well as by providing in-kind grants for agribusiness expansion.

The core of the Program is the further enhancement of regional agricultural cooperatives/farmers/SMEs, promotion of market growth, as well as establishment of new connections with international distributors for increasing export volumes. All this as well as in-kind grants and technical assistance are aimed at ensuring long-term food security in the regions of Armenia.

Name: Temple Economics Society
Description: The Temple Economics Society (TES) is a Student Professional Organization dedicated to connecting Temple University students interested in economics with employers and industry professionals. We provide a forum for students to interact with working professionals, discuss current events, and gain new career opportunities. TES is proud to offer our members the opportunity to attend national economic conferences and network with industry leaders.

Name: Innovation Talks
Description: Italks son una serie de charlas cortas con expertos en temas de emprendimiento tecnológico orientado a fortalecer sus conocimientos y ser una herramienta importante dentro del econosistema. Son sesiones creativas por expertos en temas de innovación, emprendimiento y desarrollo empresarial. El objetivo es transferir conocimiento, experiencias y mejores prácticas a los integrantes del ecosistema de innovación, tecnología y emprendimiento de Chihuahua y de todo el mundo.

Name: Community Futures Treaty7
Description: CFT7 has a dual mandate of Entrepreneurship and Training and Employment. The two programs operate independently under separate funding arrangements with staff dedicated to each, however they work collaboratively on projects and planning.

Name: Michigan Economics Society
Description: Founded in 1973, the Michigan Economics Society seeks to offer programming that is not addressed in the economics curriculum alone and bring together students from all disciplines with a common interest in economics. MES is one of the largest student organizations on campus, with members from a variety of academic backgrounds. Our broad array of events and services include corporate presentations, professional development workshops, enrichment-oriented panels, and academic support services. The strength of MES comes from its members and relies on their hard work and diligence to achieve its aims of providing quality services to those interested in economics. There are many new, exciting, and innovative events, projects, and activities occurring within economics at the university and beyond. By joining MES, you can be a part of this.

Name: Dunn Economic Development
Description:
Welcome to Dunn Economic Development, your built-in business ally for growth in Dunn County. We are a first-of-its-kind partnership, clearing the path for business success by aligning resources and championing your project from day one. 

Representing a unique collaboration between the City of Menomonie, Dunn County, local development corporations, and the University of Wisconsin-Stout, we serve as a one-stop connection for businesses looking to expand, relocate, or launch. Our approach is efficient, and our focus is on helping you move forward. 

Why Dunn County?
-STRATEGIC LOCATION: Situated on the I-94 corridor between the Twin Cities and Eau Claire, we offer direct access to major metro markets and national logistics. 
-INNOVATION & TALENT: As home to UW-Stout, Wisconsin’s Polytechnic University and the Chippewa Valley Technical College, our community fosters world-class innovation and a skilled workforce with a proven Midwest work ethic. 
-SUPPORTIVE COMMUNITY: Experience big vision without the big-city headaches—we help you navigate our business-friendly climate where relationships matter. 

We are actively tackling the challenges that matter for sustainable growth. Through collaborative initiatives focused on expanding workforce housing and infrastructure, we ensure your investment can scale smoothly for the long term. 

We provide dedicated support for:
-Site Selectors & Relocating Businesses 
-Housing Developers 
-Entrepreneurs & Startups 
-Existing Local Employers 
-Community & Municipal Partners 

Whether you need site data, incentive information, or a simple introduction, we're here to help. Let's connect and explore what's possible in Dunn County!

Name: Ministry of Finance and Economic Planning sudan
La Canopée
Description:
La Canopée, portée par Roche aux Fées Communauté, se veut un tiers-lieu agile de l'entrepreneuriat, de l'innovation, du numérique, de l'emploi et de la formation. Elle répond aux objectifs suivants :

>Développer l'attractivité économique du territoire par la valorisation/soutien à l'entrepreneuriat et aux entreprises, l'accès à un lieu de travail mutualisé et innovant, la coordination de réseaux et de synergies entre acteurs et structures partenaires
>Favoriser l'insertion et la formation tout au long de la vie par l'accompagnement des personnes en recherche d'emploi et salariés en reconversion, la valorisation de l'emploi local, la création d'une offre innovante et de qualité en réponse aux besoins des habitants. Informez-vous sur l'accompagnement à l'emploi et la formation ici.
>Accompagner les publics vers la transformation numérique par la sensibilisation et un accompagnement aux usages numériques, la valorisation des outils, compétences et métiers.
>S'inscrire durablement dans les transitions (économique, écologique, sociétale...), favoriser les modèles d'apprentissage par le faire et le collectif, construire les politiques publiques par la coopération des acteurs.

Pour répondre à ces enjeux hybrides, La Canopée s'est dotée d'outils et de prestations :

-Un espace de Coworking disposant d'open-space, de bureaux fermés, de salles de réunion avec des formules flexibles
-Un FabLab, laboratoire de fabrication numérique tout équipé
-Une cyber-base de 5 postes informatiques en libre-service avec accès Internet
-Un service d'accompagnement et de permanences pour nos publics cibles (entrepreneurs, dirigeants, porteurs de projet, demandeurs d'emploi...). 
-Des ateliers et des formations, animés par nos partenaires tout au long de l'année pour vous informer, développer de nouvelles compétences et échanger entre pairs
Venez profiter de ce cadre apaisant pour y travailler, développer votre projet professionnel et votre créativité.

Name: WonderWealth
Description:
Alldeles för få har tillräckligt stort frihetskapital. Det vill vi ändra på! 

Tillsammans med oss tar du dina första steg på din ekonomiska resa för att skapa ett mer hållbart liv med mindre stress och mer livskvalitet. Vi älskar när du får möjlighet att njuta av livet både idag och i framtiden!

Name: Powerize Northwest Consortium
Description:
Powerize Northwest Consortium (PNWC) is a group of public, private and community organizations that leverage regional talent and assets to become a global leader in the rapidly expanding energy storage and smart grid markets.
 
PNWC is the recipient of NSF innovation engine and EDA TechHubs strategy and planning grants. Its members collaborate for a brighter energy future for all.

PNWC seeks to solidify Oregon/the Northwest as a national leader in critical smart grid infrastructure and energy storage, re-centering strategic US manufacturing to achieve scale in the dual service of our national security and economic prosperity interests. We connect the dots from use-inspired research through commercialization and global scale, with a focus on local workforce development and equity in access to great future careers.

Name: The High Ground of Texas
Description: The High Ground of Texas is a regional economic development coalition of 70 counties in the Panhandle, South Plains, Permian Basin and Big Country regions of Texas.

Name: Gallia County, Ohio, Economic Development
Description:
Located along the Ohio River in the heart of the eastern United States, Gallia County, Ohio, has an affordability, dependability, and accessibility that few communities can match. 

That’s why companies ranging from hospitals, to financial institutions, to manufacturers, to logistics and distribution, to powerplants have called Gallia County home for decades.

Gallia County Economic Development serves as the lead economic development agency for the County, representing the business community to our regional and state partners. 

Whether you’re an existing business looking to grow, a site selector working on behalf of a major client, or just getting your business off the ground, it’s our business to help your business achieve its full potential.

Gallia County Economic Development operates under a unique partnership with the University of Rio Grande and Rio Grande Community College, whereby the University’s Director of Economic Development represents Gallia County to existing and prospective companies in the County.

Name: ECONOMY FOR LIFE
Description:
ECONOMY FOR LIFE is a project co-funded by the European Commission whose main aim is to improve the economic-financial education of young Europeans (18-30 years old), providing them with basic, useful and practical knowledge so that they can function with ease in society and in their daily lives, especially in their economic activities. The idea of the project was born as a response to the lack of training in this field, or to the deficiencies of current training, as numerous studies highlight, such as the PISA report. Economic education in schools and universities is quite poor, often non-existent, leading to financial illiteracy in a significant number of young people.
This project has, at the same time, three specific objectives:
-	Promote equal training opportunities, seeking to alleviate the needs of young people with lower performance or lower socioeconomic conditions.
-	Improve the financial education of young adults so that they can function as European citizens with greater autonomy and effectiveness in society.
-	Seek a more prosperous and supportive society, as well as sustainable growth.
The project results will be:
-	A Handbook of Economics for Life: containing: 
1)	Introductory guide to guide the interested party. 
2)	Theoretical block divided into 5 areas: Banking, investment, Basic Economics, Business and Labor Law.
3)	Series of 25 case studies applied to real life. 
4)	Glossary of 60 economic concepts  
-	Multimedia content: 60 short videos that developing the previous content.
The consortium is made up of 3 European organisations:
- Neotalentway (Granada, Spain), an educational consultancy specialising in training and the development of European projects.
- Akademia Humanistyczno-Ekonomiczna w Łodzi (Poland), private university specialised in economic and business studies.
- Action For The Civil Society, (Athens, Greece), organisation specialised in training, guidance and entrepreneurship for young people.

Name: UTSA Institute for Economic Development
Description:
The UTSA Institute for Economic Development has helped over 6,000 businesses open their doors and created more than 66,000 jobs in the Texas economy.

We are 10 centers and programs that excel in results-oriented advising, training and research for startups, existing businesses and policymakers seeking strategic economic growth, serving local, regional, national and international initiatives.

IED offers training, consulting, economic and market research, target audience analysis, access to capital, lab to market movement for technology, business start ups, new export market discovery, international trade assistance and government contracting and procurement support and training. IED also offers technology development support.

IED serves businesses, small businesses and minority-owned businesses, innovators, entrepreneurs and start ups, UTSA students and researchers, and policymakers: Federal, State and Local.

Name: Startup Unidos
Description:
We are a community of binational believers and changemakers, rooted in Southern Arizona and Northern Sonora. Startup Unidos (SU) is dedicated to empowering underserved border communities through innovation, collaboration, and entrepreneurship. By nurturing emerging companies, growing businesses, and building future-ready workforces, we turn challenges at the border into opportunities.

Our Mission:
Startup Unidos is a catalyst for long-term growth and success in the borderlands. Through bilingual, culturally anchored programs, we empower individuals and organizations to overcome systemic barriers, fostering meaningful, life-changing impacts.

Our Vision:
We aim to ignite and sustain the US/MEX Entrepreneurship Ecosystem through dynamic partnerships and coalitions. By strengthening education, mentorship, and knowledge-sharing, we help communities thrive across both sides of the border.

What We Do:
At Startup Unidos, we empower people to transform their circumstances. By identifying gaps and investing in innovative solutions, we create real change in:

Community Engagement: Building inclusive, resilient communities through cross-border collaboration.

Entrepreneurship & Business Support: Providing tools, mentorship, and resources to help businesses grow.

Education & Capacity Building: Equipping individuals with the skills needed to thrive in evolving economies.

Our Approach:
Startup Unidos unites industry, government, academia, and grassroots networks with a binational and bilingual strategy to deliver impactful programs. We are focused on the work, not defined by it—empowering individuals to reimagine their futures and take action.

Join Us:
Be part of a movement that’s reshaping the Arizona-Sonora border region. Together, we’re not just building businesses—we’re building bridges.

Name: Ukraine Economic Outlook
Description: The organisation's activities in the B2C segment are focused on monitoring the state of the domestic economy (key markets and industries) and regularly preparing country outlooks. As an independent consultant, our team has worked with the Ministry of Digital Transformation of Ukraine, the Office of the President of Ukraine, the Ministry of Economy of Ukraine, the State Property Fund of Ukraine and the National Security and Defence Council.

Name: Bois Chaudière-Appalaches (BOCA)
Description:
BOCA a pour mission d'aider les entreprises manufacturières du secteur de la transformation du bois à être plus compétitives sur les marchés locaux et internationaux grâce à son leadership, à son réseau, à la force de ses membres et à la réalisation de projets mobilisateurs pour l’Industrie.

La transformation du bois en Chaudière-Appalaches, ce sont plus de 350 entreprises manufacturières et près de 11 000 emplois.  BOCA regroupe entre autres des entreprises spécialisées dans la fabrication des produits suivants :
	- maisons pré-usinées   -   armoires de cuisine   -   structures préfabriquées   -   escaliers   -   poutrelles
	- meubles   -   mobilier commercial   -   revêtements extérieurs   -   planchers   -   panneaux   -   moulures
	- bois d’oeuvre   -   portes et fenêtres

BOCA est issue de la démarche ACCORD (Action concertée de coopération régionale de développement) qui s’appuie sur les forces régionales et sur la recherche de l’excellence dans les secteurs clés du Québec.  Elle favorise le regroupement de gens d’affaires et d’entrepreneurs d’une même région qui ont une vision commune de leur secteur d’activité et qui définissent une stratégie à long terme pour le mettre en valeur.

Name: Michigan Growth Advisors
Description:
Michigan Growth Advisors serves clients nationwide by delivering economic incentive solutions available through local, state, and federal programs.

Economic incentive packages create opportunity for businesses and commercial real estate developers deciding on their strategic development. Knowing what incentive programs apply and securing the most comprehensive benefits available can dramatically affect the viability and success of a project. Our team’s advisory experience enables us to proactively identify and secure the public incentives available to meet the specific needs of our clients.

We are collaborative in our approach to incentive procurement. We consult with clients on their goals and objectives and provide meaningful solutions when seeking discretionary incentives.

Name: Association Pully Paudex Belmont
Description: L’Association Pully Paudex Belmont agit pour dynamiser l’économie, le sport, la culture et le tourisme en renforçant les synergies entre acteurs locaux. Elle soutient les commerçants, clubs sportifs et initiatives culturelles en favorisant des collaborations et en organisant des événements fédérateurs. Son engagement contribue à faire rayonner la région, en valorisant son dynamisme et en créant des opportunités pour ses habitants et visiteurs.

Name: VIRIDI Interreg SI-AT
Description:
Das Ziel des Projektes VIRIDI ist es, die grenzüberschreitende Zusammenarbeit zwischen Österreich und Slowenien für den Übergang zu einer Kreislaufwirtschaft von kleinen und mittleren Unternehmen (KMU) und die effiziente Nutzung von Ressourcen und die Digitalisierung in geschäftlichen und technologischen Prozessen in verschiedenen Wirtschaftssektoren anzuregen und zu stärken.

Bestätigter Wert des Projektes: 1,4 Millionen Euro
- davon erhaltene EFRE Unterstützung: 1,1 Millionen Euro

Projektlaufzeit: 01.10.2023 - 30.09.2026
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Cilj projekta VIRIDI je spodbuditi in okrepiti čezmejno sodelovanje med Avstrijo in Slovenijo za prehod v krožno gospodarstvo malih in srednje velikih podjetij (MSP-jev) ter učinkovito rabo virov in digitalizacije v poslovnih in tehnoloških procesih različnih gospodarskih panog.

Potrjena vrednost celotnega projekta: 1,4 mio €
- od tega prejeta podpora ESRR: 1,1 mio €

Trajanje projekta: 01.10.2023 – 30.09.2026

Name: Irish Sea Rim
Description:
Transforming the Irish Sea from a boundary into a bridge of opportunity.

The Irish Sea Rim (ISR) Investment Innovation Enterprise Zone represents a revolutionary approach to regional development, uniting 6 jurisdictions in an unprecedented collaboration. Just as the Mediterranean and Baltic Seas serve as catalysts for regional prosperity, we're reimagining the Irish Sea as a powerful connector for economic growth, innovation, and cultural exchange.

Our vision spans:
 100,000 new jobs by 2035
 800,000+ businesses networked
 40+ universities collaborating
 £1B+ in strategic investments
 Pioneering sustainable energy initiatives

At our core is the innovative 'Spherical Economy' model, where traditional sectors merge with future-focused solutions.

Our flagship Energy Race isn't just a sporting event - it's a symbol of regional unity, drawing millions of spectators while showcasing our commitment to sustainable development.

Through the Irish Sea Rim Environmental & Scientific Observatory, we're leading the charge in marine research and environmental protection.

Our cross-border business networks are creating unprecedented opportunities for trade and collaboration, while our educational partnerships are nurturing the next generation of innovators.

From Southwest Scotland to Eastern Ireland, from Northwest England to Wales, and from Northern Ireland to the Isle of Man, we're breaking down traditional barriers. Our mission transcends political boundaries, focusing instead on collective growth and shared prosperity.

Join us as we write a new chapter in regional cooperation.

The Irish Sea Rim isn't just an organisation - it's a movement toward a more connected, prosperous, and sustainable future.

Together, we're proving that the most powerful bridges aren't built with steel and concrete, but with collaboration and shared vision.

https://irishsearim.org/

Description: The Schwyz Institute is a global educational institution specialising in all business and economic subjects in areas such as management, growth, leadership, and more. All our programs are designed to empower ambitious individuals with the skills, knowledge, and confidence to excel in business and leadership. Through our certified offering, students can earn BBA and MBA titles fully online. Our flexible learning approach combines cutting-edge modern curricula, expert faculty, and real-world relevance. Name: City of Laredo Economic Development Department
Aroostook Partnership
Description:
The Aroostook Partnership is a 501(c)6 nonprofit organization based in Caribou, Maine. We are a unique private/public regional economic development organization comprised of members who care deeply about growing a strong and resilient economy in Maine's northernmost county. 

We are proud of our strong partnership with the Northern Maine Development Commission, which provides federal and state services at the regional and local level. Our members include County higher education institutions, regional nonprofits, and more than 60 small, medium, and large for-profit companies. Together, their contributions allow the Aroostook Partnership to support key initiatives designed to advance our area's broader business community.

Name: Industrie und Handelskammer zu Berlin - IHK Berlin
Description:
Die IHK Berlin ist die Organisation der Berliner Unternehmen. Zugegeben – der Zusammenschluss der Unternehmen in der IHK ist keine freiwillige Angelegenheit, sondern gesetzlich vorgeschrieben. Dem Gesetzgeber lag daran, eine Institution der Wirtschaft zu schaffen, die einerseits den Bedürfnissen der Wirtschaft Rechnung trägt, andererseits aber unabhängig vom Einfluss oder speziellen Interessen einzelner Wirtschaftszweige, Branchen oder Unternehmen ist. Eine IHK muss demnach das Interesse aller zu ihr gehörenden Unternehmen im Blick behalten und vor diesem Hintergrund die Wirtschaft ihrer Region insgesamt fördern. Dort wo wirtschaftliche Tätigkeit im Interesse der Allgemeinheit geregelt werden muss, kann die IHK als eigene Einrichtung der Wirtschaft diese Aufgaben übernehmen und so den staatlichen Einfluss auf Unternehmen möglichst gering halten.
Was heißt das für die IHK Berlin konkret?

    Wir fördern den Wirtschaftsstandort Berlin und setzen uns für gute Bedingungen für die Berliner Unternehmen ein. Die Interessen der Berliner Wirtschaft vertreten wir mit breitgefächertem Sachverstand und sind in allen Wirtschaftsfragen kompetenter Gesprächspartner für Senat und Behörden sowie anderer Interessengruppen. Wir äußern uns zu Gesetzes- oder Verwaltungsvorhaben, die die Wirtschaft berühren, wir sind Gutachter oder Berater in Fachausschüssen oder Partner bei vielen unterschiedlichen Initiativen in Berlin.
    Dort wo staatliche Regelung unvermeidbar ist, übernehmen wir hoheitliche Aufgaben, gestalten diese unbürokratisch und erfüllen sie effizient.
    Wir unterstützen die Berliner Unternehmen mit einer Fülle an Dienstleistungen, ohne dabei jedoch zum Konkurrenten für unsere Mitglieder zu werden.

Für die Umsetzung dieser Aufgaben in die praktische tägliche Arbeit sind die Unternehmen Berlins und die Mitarbeiter der IHK gemeinsam verantwortlich. Für alle wirtschaftsrelevanten Fragen kombinieren wir den unternehmerischen Esprit unseres Ehrenamtes und fachspezifischen Sa

This inaugural statewide event brings together changemakers from across recreation, conservation, business, and government to chart the next chapter of West Virginia’s outdoor economy. Hosted in Charleston, February 17–19, 2026, the Summit is built to spark ideas, partnerships, and action that strengthen communities and grow opportunity through the power of the outdoors.

Name: ReRubber Solutions
Description: Das Netzwerk ReRubber Solutions ist ein offener Verbund mittelständischer Unternehmen und wissenschaftlicher Forschungseinrichtungen. Unser Ziel ist es, die innovative Forschung und Entwicklung des Sekundärrohstoffs Gummimehl voranzubringen und damit eine möglichst hochwertige Verarbeitung von Gummimehl zu erreichen. Die dem Netzwerk ReRubber Solutions angeschlossenen Unternehmen sind auf die Herstellung, Verarbeitung sowie Analyse und Weiterentwicklung von Gummimehl spezialisiert. Hand in Hand entwickeln Unternehmen und Hochschulen in diesem Innovationsnetzwerk Lösungen für den wertvollen Sekundärrohstoff Gummimehl– sowohl in der Herstellung als auch im Hinblick auf neue Verfahren zur Verarbeitung sowie die stoffliche Anwendung. Vorhandene Verfahren werden gemeinsam optimiert und neue, innovative Produkte werden auf den Weg gebracht.

Name: Tay Cities Region Deal Skills & Employability Programme
Description:
The Tay Cities Region Deal (TCRD) have allocated up to £20m to the Skills & Employability Programme over the 10 years of the deal (2020 to 2030) and is funded by the Scottish Government.
The Programme aims to enhance the employability and skills landscape in the Tay Cities Region. By addressing barriers, improving economic performance, and reducing economic inactivity, the Programme seeks to create a positive impact for citizens and businesses.

Name: Ordre des Experts Comptables de Tunisie Conseil Régional du Centre
Agence Gabonaise pour le Développement de l'Economie Verte (AGADEV)
Description: Nos missions principales sont la valorisation du capital naturel, la monétisation des crédits carbone et biodiversité, ainsi que la restauration des écosystèmes.

Name: USAID Ethiopia Resilience Learning Activity
Description: The USAID Ethiopia Resilience Learning Activity (RLA) is a “learning sidecar” for USAID’s resilience investments, working across USAID staff, offices, and implementing agencies (projects) to strengthen a culture of learning, sharing, evidence generation, substantiation, and triangulation. Ultimately, our aim is to build a common understanding and direct investments in resilience-building strategies and interventions that demonstratively result in more resilient households, communities, and systems. RLA is a five- year learning project implemented by the US based small business, LINC, from 2022 to 2027.

Name: Grand Junction Economic Partnership (GJEP)
Description:
Colorado’s Grand Junction area, nestled between the snow-capped Rocky Mountains and the stunning Moab desert, embraces western work ethic and new-age innovation. Grand Junction is where small-town hospitality meets big-city accessibility. It’s home to a flourishing economy, a nation-leading labor supply, and affordable housing opportunities.


Comprised of the City of Grand Junction, the City of Fruita, and the Town of Palisade, this valley is brimming with business opportunities, talent, and an appreciation for the outdoors. Bring your business where life is grand!
GJEP's dynamic ecosystem of support connects you with a talented workforce, financing opportunities, the best locations, and gets you a seat at the right table. Here, your business isn't just another spoke in the wheel, you are in the driver's seat, actively participating in the valley's economic future.

Name: Hampshire Prosperity Partnership
Description:
The Hampshire Prosperity Partnership works to boost economic prosperity, innovation and skills for the future. 

We are led by a Board comprising representatives from businesses, local government and education, who work collaboratively identifying the actions needed to maintain Hampshire’s competitiveness, while ensuring businesses are successful, minimising unemployment and attracting the benefits of inward investment into the county.

Our work plays a vital role in helping to inform Hampshire County Council decisions in relation to economic development and skills to ensure the best outcomes for local people.

Hampshire Growth Hub

The Hampshire Growth Hub is a free expert advice and resource network which helps businesses achieve results quickly through a personal, tailored service focused on growth. 

As a government funded support service we engage with businesses of all sizes across Hampshire. For businesses employing fewer than 250 staff, which are seeking to grow or scale, there is specialist advice available to support sustainable growth.

If you are seeking to grow your business, or would like a free review send us a Direct Message, email growth.hub@hants.gov.uk or visit www.hants.gov.uk/business/hampshire-growth-hub

Hampshire Careers Hub

The Hampshire Careers Hub supports schools and colleges across the county to improve their careers programmes and create opportunities for young people. We connect careers leads and teachers with businesses and other employers, helping to bridge the gap between education and the local labour market.

We also provide opportunities for employers and business volunteers to work with schools and colleges to share their perspective and sector insights with careers leads and students.

Name: Seaworthy Collective
Description:
Seaworthy Collective is a Miami-based 501c3 nonprofit that supports current and aspiring entrepreneurs driving innovation for ocean impact (AKA BlueTech). Our mission is to bring all hands on deck for BlueTech, via programs to co-create and grow early-stage startups, build regional capacity, and educate our community. 
We empower Sea Change Makers – founders of all backgrounds leading profitable and planet-positive businesses. Since 2021, we’ve supported 40 BlueTech startups and 78 founders, who have raised over $20 million since graduating. Based in Miami, our local and global community generates scalable solutions for 71% of the planet (our ocean) to regenerate 100% of the planet.
Learn more at www.SeaworthyCollective.com

Name: Helvetas Ukraine
Description:
Helvetas Swiss Intercooperation is a Swiss organization present in 35 countries across Africa, Asia, Latin America, and Eastern Europe. It’s activities are focused on sustainable development initiatives, infrastructure recovery, economic recovery, and resilience.
 
Helvetas applies a nexus approach, engaging civil society, government, and the private sector.
 
In Ukraine, Helvetas implements programmes for economic recovery and development and supports the rehabilitation of housing and water infrastructure in communities. Our solutions are grounded in strong analysis of Ukraine’s labour market and economic trends, ensuring effective, sustainable and scalable approaches to recovery.
 
Helvetas currently operates in the Kyiv, Kharkiv, Chernihiv, Sumy, Dnipro and Poltava regions and plans to expand its activities. Working at multiple levels, Helvetas collaborates with national and local authorities, businesses, and a network of civil society partners to deliver on its objectives.

Name: AMT - Mobility and Transport Authority
Description: The Mobility and Transport Authority is an Independent Economic Regulator that operates throughout the national territory. Its mission is to regulate and supervise the mobility and transport sector for land, river, rail, and their respective infrastructures, as well as the economic activities in the commercial ports and maritime transport sector, considered services of general economic interest and network-based activities. This is achieved through its powers of regulation, supervision, inspection, and sanctions, with responsibilities regarding the protection of consumer rights and interests, and the promotion and defense of competition in the private, public, cooperative, and social sectors, according to these statutes and other legal instruments. The activities of the AMT impact the lives of citizens and businesses. Its action is directed at operators of railway, road, maritime, river, port, and logistics services and infrastructures, encompassing the transport of passengers and goods. The AMT promotes more efficient, safer, decarbonized, digital, accessible, non-competitive, and more sustainable mobility, building a better and more inclusive mobility and transport system and market for all citizens and businesses.

Name: USAID Business Egypt
Description: USAID Business Egypt is a five-year, USAID-funded program implemented by DAI. Business Egypt aims to substantially increase sales revenues and investments among Egyptian Micro, Small, and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs), thereby creating new job opportunities, especially for women and youth.

Name: PakistanUninc
Description: Paving pathways to Pakistan's centennial. Developing its Land, People and Businesses collectively shaping Pakistan's Economy to be in the top 10 by 2047.

Name: House Of Kosova
Description: Davos, Switzerland 19 - 23 January 2026

Name: Risque Pays RDC
Description:
Le ministère des Finances de la République Démocratique du Congo a récemment mis en place une plateforme Risque Pays, dans le but de stimuler les investissements dans le pays.

Cette plateforme du ministère des finances a pour mission de mettre à disposition du public, des données économiques et financières en vue de rendre plus attractive, l'économie du pays et d'en apprécier les opportunités d'investissements.

Ces données tiendront compte des agrégats macro-économiques tels que :

- L’environnement économique
- La gestion des finances publiques
- La solidité du système monétaire et financier
- L’environnement social
- L’environnement politique

Dans le cadre de la mise en œuvre de ses activités, La plateforme Risque Pays du Ministère des Finances de la RDC organise en Septembre prochain, la 1ère édition de La Conférence Risque Pays RDC , conférence au cours de laquelle un rapport d'analyse des forces, des faiblesses et des axes d'amélioration de la République Démocratique du Congo sera présenté à d'éminentes personnalités issues de différentes catégories socioprofessionnelles.

Nous vous donnons donc rendez-vous le mercredi 28 Juin 2023 à Kinshasa.

Name: Western Canada Economic Forum
Description: The Western Canada Economic Forum brings together government, academia and industry to discuss key economic issues facing the western Canadian economy.

Name: Miami Tech Works
Description:
Miami Tech Works is a $10 million initiative funded by the Good Jobs Challenge and the Economic Development Administration (EDA).  Led by Miami Dade College, Florida International University, Florida Memorial University, OIC of South Florida, Miami-Dade County, City of Miami, Miami-Dade Beacon Council, Lab22C, Refresh Miami, and CareerSource South Florida. 

In February 2023, Miami Tech Works launched the Miami Tech Talent Coalition, an industry-led partnership, which bridges the gap between employers and tech talent in Miami. By creating a sustainable pipeline of skilled workers, promoting career pathways in technology, and supporting the growth and vitality of the local tech talent pipeline.

Name: WISTA Management GmbH
Description:
WISTA Management GmbH is an experienced developer, service provider, and business promoter. As an initiator and economic catalyst, WISTA contributes to strengthening the basis of Berlin’s regional economy by bringing together scientists and entrepreneurs. Its tasks include the establishment, operation and letting out of modern technology centres as well as the sale of properties.

WISTA also supports the founding of new businesses, supports companies, connects science and business, and fosters national and international cooperation.

PROJECTS:

WISTA operates the Science and Technology Park Berlin Adlershof and the Charlottenburg Innovation Centre (CHIC) in Berlin’s City West. It is active in managing the Berlin Southeast region and in setting up a technology and startup centre in Berlin-Dahlem (FUBIC).

WISTA has also taken over site marketing for the Cleantech Business Park Marzahn industrial estate and is preparing the construction of innovative business parks at various locations in Berlin.

On behalf of Berlin’s Senate Department for Economics, Energy and Public Enterprises, it is operating the business office for Berlin’s “Zukunftsorte” (places of future innovation).

START-UPS:

The WISTA business incubators offer start-ups services and space at favourable conditions in a business development network.
The services are supplemented by special support programmes for founders and the in-house coworking space IM.PULS.

A² Innovation Programme Berlin: Tailor-made support with professional coaching and free space for founders with high market potential, as well as access to valuable networks and contacts.

Legal notice: https://www.wista.de/en/legal-notice/

Name: Youth Economy Agency Saint Lucia
Description: The Youth Economy Agency (YEA), is an Agency established by the Youth Economy Act No. 17 of 2022. YEA was established to provide young people with a special economic space to turn hobbies into entrepreneurship and skills into businesses. The Agency aims to carve out a unique space in the general economic system for youth entrepreneurship and business growth by providing state resources to young people to create sustainable livelihoods through business development, finance and marketing support, and training and mentorship.

Name: Pokreni se za posao
Description:
Program POKRENI SE ZA POSAO namenjen je privrednim društvima i preduzetnicima kojima upravljaju žene i/ili mladi do 35 godina starosti, sa ciljem pružanja finansijske i nefinansijske podrške za unapređenje poslovanja.

Cilj programa je unapređenje poslovanja kroz:
Nadogradnju znanja
Modernizaciju opreme
Usklađivanje sa standardima održivosti i ESG principima (ekološkim, socijalnim i aspektima upravljanja)
Implementaciju inovativnih rešenja u poslovanju

Program POKRENI SE ZA POSAO zajednički realizuju ProCredit banka ad Beograd, Odeljenje za tehničku pomoć Evropskog fonda za jugoistočnu Evropu (EFSE DF) i ENECA.

Više informacija: www.pokrenisezaposao.rs

Name: creative.nrw
Description:
creative.nrw ist das Netzwerk der Kreativen in NRW. Im Auftrag des Ministeriums für Wirtschaft, Industrie, Klimaschutz und Energie des Landes Nordrhein-Westfalen zeigen, vernetzen und stärken wir die Akteur:innen der Kreativwirtschaft in NRW. Mit vielfältigen Angeboten und Initiativen unterstützen wir die Kreativen dabei, ihre Potenziale zur Entfaltung zu bringen.

Wir glauben an die Kraft der Kreativität, und wir wissen um den Ideenreichtum und die Leistungsstärke der kreativen Köpfe und Unternehmen in ganz NRW. Gemeinsam mit starken Partner:innen arbeiten wir daran, ihre Impulse für Innovation und Wachstum in Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft noch weiter zu verstärken – und die Rahmenbedingungen für erfolgreiches kreatives Arbeiten stetig zu verbessern. Kultur- und Kreativwirtschaft verstehen wir in NRW als Querschnittsbranche, die dazu beiträgt, Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft nachhaltig zu transformieren. Deshalb nehmen wir auch die Schnittstellen etwa zu digitaler Wirtschaft, Tourismus und Gesundheitswirtschaft oder zu Themen wie Klimaschutz, Corporate Social Responsibility und neuen Technologien in den Fokus. Mit unserem interdisziplinären Team sind wir Ansprechpartner:innen für die Kreativen in NRW – und für alle, die sie unterstützen und mit ihnen arbeiten möchten.

creative.nrw ist eine externe Dienstleistung des Ministeriums für Wirtschaft, Industrie, Klimaschutz und Energie des Landes Nordrhein-Westfalen, ausgeführt durch die Boros GmbH.

Name: Presente Fondo de Empleados
Description: En PRESENTE trabajamos día a día para transformar la vida de nuestros asociados. Somos una entidad líder en servicios de ahorro, crédito, recreación y previsión en Colombia. Aquí, trabajamos con pasión, integridad, innovación y compromiso por nuestros cerca de 40.000 asociados y su grupo familiar, que supera una población de más de 160.000 personas. En PRESENTE ofrecemos servicios superiores, que garantizan la tranquilidad, seguridad, confianza y bienestar de nuestros asociados.

Name: Startup Factory boOst
Description: boOst is the deep-tech venture builder for Central Germany, powered by a coalition of universities, industry and investors that delivers a full stack of venture-building programmes from inspiration to international scale.

Name: Invest Hamilton County
Description:
Invest Hamilton County is focused on empowering economic vitality for the County’s businesses and residents. This is accomplished by fostering collaboration, leading with quality research, and implementing workforce development and quality of life priorities across the county. 

***

Invest Hamilton County – Social Media Comment Policy

We welcome conversation and engagement on our social media channels. Our goal is to create a respectful, inclusive space for dialogue about our community and the work of Invest Hamilton County.

We will not remove comments simply because they are critical of IHC or our team. However, we do reserve the right to hide or delete comments that include:

Profanity, obscenity, or graphic content
Threats of violence or promotion of illegal activity
Discrimination or harassment based on race, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, veteran status, or any other protected class
Spam, duplicate posts, or misleading links
Malware, malicious content, or attempts to disrupt our platforms
Personal attacks, defamation, or false claims about individuals
Content that infringes on copyrights or intellectual property rights

By engaging with us on social media, you agree to follow these guidelines as well as the policies of the platform you’re using.

We appreciate your participation and look forward to constructive conversation that advances the mission of Invest Hamilton County.

Name: Pattern
Description:
Founded in 2010, PATTERN--a 501(c)3--supports, empowers, and grows the Creative Economy* in Indiana. We envision a future where INDIANA is recognized internationally as a leader of creativity and innovation.

*Creative Economy encompasses a wide range of activities that marry creativity, intellectual property, knowledge, and technology to generate value and drive economic growth. Unlike traditional economies, which are easier to quantify through tangible goods and straightforward services, the creative economy includes industries like art, culture, design, fashion, entertainment, and technology, where value often comes from intangible assets like ideas and innovation.

Name: LCR Freeport
Description:
Liverpool City Region Freeport, a programme within the Liverpool City Region Combined Authority, is one of the UK’s leading special economic zones. LCR Freeport is a 45km zone, providing significant tax, customs and planning incentives for businesses wishing to establish in the city region and / or are involved in the importing, processing and re-exporting of goods. 

Building on a heritage of international maritime trade, with the Port of Liverpool handling 45% of all UK trade from the US, LCR Freeport is an anchor for UK and international trade. 

LCR Freeport is an enabler for social value, economic sustainability, innovation, net zero, value job creation and growth. LCR Freeport, supports UK government and regional partners’ vision of ‘levelling up’ to increase prosperity, widen opportunity and ensure the life chances are improved for current and future generations.

Follow us for the latest news and insights from the LCR Freeport.

Name: Viva-Vaud
Description:
Viva propose des outils pour faciliter la transition de votre entreprise en matière de durabilité.

Viva soutient toutes les entreprises pour construire ensemble un avenir plus durable pour le canton de Vaud.

Une initiative collective, conçue par les principaux acteurs économiques du canton.
